| | | If you’re a last-minute shopper, The Biden Administration will be robbing you of Christmas joy.
Due to supply chain issues caused by the Biden Administration, **not only will Christmas presents cost more this season, but they will also take longer to arrive. **
Issues at major ports have created massive holds on receiving and distributing imports. These holds are caused by labor shortages, which mask and vaccine mandates have only amplified.
[**_Contribute $25 right now if you are sick of mandates and shutdowns. _**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cikgud-ykykmujid-t/)
It is no secret that this administration can largely be classified as a dumpster fire, but now it is affecting your paychecks and your holiday in a way it hasn’t before.
[**_My Christmas list consists of a change in leadership, and the best gift I can get from you is your support._**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cikgud-ykykmujid-i/)

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: I am losing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
Please read

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599388:6LzZS72NN:m:1:3253819041:49BDC1403832C62E047AA6BBE639C2C2:r)
---
Peter,

**I hate to break the bad news, but I am losing. **

I don't mean to scare you, but this is serious. We only have 9 days until Election Day, and time is truly running out. This race **WAS** dead-tied, but Terry McAuliffe brought in Stacey Abrams, Kamala Harris, Joe Biden, and Barack Obama to help him take the lead - AND IT WORKED.

**[Now, more than ever I need your help. name: National Republican Polling
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zk6flmujsr5365dq7g67ld2mv0o3gb8l6fvh7g8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1hm9or6cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z95hfp38273lav8nedtu54f56j6hb4rb4fih57ro_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1hm9or6cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zg5vecma5dc6g8pt198gvmi7ggprnkkqegegutgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1hm9or6cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zm6ggvaggggc08a0nejc90at94g7bik0t4j877v8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2ia4v3mh5lr3ve460oetgda2jv7usi99k8o3pm0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6clg66p73cpie49fg)

name: Secretary Pompeo
subject: Protect Religious Freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, I'm asking you to donate to show the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and freedoms. Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, I'm asking you to donate to show the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and freedoms.

| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599417:6vilU72NV:m:1:3253819041:B61C92F59BECABDEB4BA258FC7969E6F:r)
---
| As President Trump's Secretary of State, I was proud to lead the charge to protect religious freedom all around the globe. No one should be attacked by their government for simply living out their faith. Working alongside President Trump, we made great progress.

Unfortunately, our work is being undone by the Democrat majority in Washington. _In fact, religious freedom, especially for followers of Christ, is under increasing attack right here in the United States from our own government._

**[Will you support religious freedom here at home and around the world?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599417:6vilU72NV:m:1:3253819041:B61C92F59BECABDEB4BA258FC7969E6F:r "Will you support religious freedom here at home and around the world?")**

The founding of our country is deeply rooted in Judeo-Christian values, and now Americans are being criticized and attacked for standing up for those very values. It is deeply troubling.

**Let 's be clear: no society can retain its legitimacy or a virtuous character without religious liberty.**

Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, **[I'm asking you to join me in showing the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and freedoms.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599417:6vilU72NV:m:1:3253819041:B61C92F59BECABDEB4BA258FC7969E6F:r "I'm asking you to
donate to show the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and
freedoms.")**
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599417:6vilU72NV:m:1:3253819041:B61C92F59BECABDEB4BA258FC7969E6F:r)
---
It's going to take all of us working hard in our churches, our towns and in our missions across the world to promote religious freedom everywhere and always.

_Religious freedom is a fundamental American value, and it must be protected at all costs._

Fighting for our future,

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State, Trump Administration

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. _**[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599418:6vilU72NV:m:1:3253819041:B61C92F59BECABDEB4BA258FC7969E6F:r "Will you chip in to
help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**_

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

name: Nicole Neily, Parents Defending Education
subject: DOJ: “Concerned parents = domesticterrorists?”
body:
Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for st
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh1l34in2buspmu8o7ld9vvfcoe4mn4r7edcemmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1jmcoj4clh2bs) Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said **they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children!** On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees – including but not limited to **the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI.** [**Tell the DOJ this is unacceptable**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjfj90kbg5sssuegato9t2uq0unupduoia177feo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1jmcoj4clh2bs) My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and _for_ the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- **the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children** \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help **silencing parents like you** who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that** parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes."** While PDE naturally does not support _anyone_ who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, **_NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat_** , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. [**Tell the DOJ you OPPOSE FBI persecution of parents**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zplsd0c6bcn5lv2adm8lfp6nm1gljm7ibvb94p1g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1jmcoj4clh2bs) I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. **We will not be bullied.** We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. **The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands.** In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. [**Tell the DOJ you won’t be bullied**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0diq7dkbd77o39qj614gmmj9jj006d5bn6f5d8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1jmcoj4clh2bs) So thank you for standing with us -- and standing _up_ for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207

clean_body: Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for st | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children! On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees – including but not limited to the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI. My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help silencing parents like you who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes." While PDE naturally does not support anyone who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. We will not be bullied. We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands. In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. So thank you for standing with us -- and standing up for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119 Arlington VA 22207 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: GOP Presidential
subject: An honest American history resource
body:
American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationw
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd758f3ge5u7i7ffpecugmeup8ia31dc9tbohsqo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1jmao36c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlcoon0pbi66ob5cpnc6qj8odn6qom1djheeoj2p3hemrb8crk6gq64crle5gbeduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75db66hhbbd1nmphmcdb0m9h3csh5u)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdoduq4o57f6bfq8p2dj97a7ccfh66fhm07ghla0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1jmao36c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history? We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future. For this reason, we have produced the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** --and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. **What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum? ** The**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College--and we are making it available **free of charge**. To be clear, the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact. _We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote the**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** and our other outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. _ That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support --not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you--citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission--to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.” With that mission in mind, we produced the **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** --and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to _**support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?**_ Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty--and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty--I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. **I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here: ** _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfghial79cmoqupm7t1o16m2diothpg4nl8c0t5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1jmao36c5h2bs)**_ Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zqdh7e2cf57l6r3h038q0goqjqb3kamdqmakm3k0).

name: Secretary Pompeo
subject: Protect Religious Freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, I'm asking you to donate to show the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and freedoms. Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, I'm asking you to donate to show the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and freedoms.

|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599423:JDtc072NM:m:1:3253819041:599B1630F6E9705615B57702DCE50EE7:r)
---
| As President Trump's Secretary of State, I was proud to lead the charge to protect religious freedom all around the globe. No one should be attacked by their government for simply living out their faith. Working alongside President Trump, we made great progress.

Unfortunately, our work is being undone by the Democrat majority in Washington. _In fact, religious freedom, especially for followers of Christ, is under increasing attack right here in the United States from our own government._

**[Will you support religious freedom here at home and around the world?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599423:JDtc072NM:m:1:3253819041:599B1630F6E9705615B57702DCE50EE7:r "Will you support religious freedom here at home and around the world?")**

The founding of our country is deeply rooted in Judeo-Christian values, and now Americans are being criticized and attacked for standing up for those very values. It is deeply troubling.

**Let 's be clear: no society can retain its legitimacy or a virtuous character without religious liberty.**

Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, **[I'm asking you to join me in showing the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and freedoms.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599423:JDtc072NM:m:1:3253819041:599B1630F6E9705615B57702DCE50EE7:r "I'm asking you to
donate to show the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and
freedoms.")**
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599423:JDtc072NM:m:1:3253819041:599B1630F6E9705615B57702DCE50EE7:r)
---
It's going to take all of us working hard in our churches, our towns and in our missions across the world to promote religious freedom everywhere and always.

_Religious freedom is a fundamental American value, and it must be protected at all costs._

Fighting for our future,

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State, Trump Administration

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION to **29910****
---

---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. _**[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599424:JDtc072NM:m:1:3253819041:599B1630F6E9705615B57702DCE50EE7:r "Will you chip in to
help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**_

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

subject: A personal note from Leader Rob Ortt
body:
Join me and support Congressman Lee Zeldin for Governor
| | | |
---
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PdxK7SFf7EDh1Na8QuApEnGrV40mf78dLW3XQFURdJuajKUcr40oPwiE3OtpjBjyVfmNAW2NUrD7hdI8dSj9M4Ri505WMWDVtLfKlH2sjTChS3z580z6K_Px_-sq1UlDzhKJGxkHbLEWpcwT8EapL6_kLxL9iEkZ9d8-ufxSUCuXamEbRrq92GJWVRSbR2faQmRhwDnGZfxC_mnEJEZfUA==&c=byoM2nzDCwvMFWEwWCT2oRt7zDA0EScpQOTv2p4ccaDIVEJOOjZU-g==&ch=KlqDHWz0m_juNFzdPsNNfEWh1fLAydm0MrJivKzAPBMjFm9tJT2mig==)
---
|
> A personal note from
> Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PdxK7SFf7EDh1Na8QuApEnGrV40mf78dLW3XQFURdJuajKUcr40oPwiE3OtpjBjyVfmNAW2NUrD7hdI8dSj9M4Ri505WMWDVtLfKlH2sjTChS3z580z6K_Px_-sq1UlDzhKJGxkHbLEWpcwT8EapL6_kLxL9iEkZ9d8-ufxSUCuXamEbRrq92GJWVRSbR2faQmRhwDnGZfxC_mnEJEZfUA==&c=byoM2nzDCwvMFWEwWCT2oRt7zDA0EScpQOTv2p4ccaDIVEJOOjZU-g==&ch=KlqDHWz0m_juNFzdPsNNfEWh1fLAydm0MrJivKzAPBMjFm9tJT2mig==)
---
Dear Friend
Thank you to all of our veterans as well as friends and family who came out to support our candidate for New York State Governor Congressman Lee Zeldin and ALL of our Republican candidates in the upcoming elections.
I, like you, want New York to be an affordable and safe place for our families to live.
Unfortunately, the Democrats and their radical ideology are standing in the way of these goals.
We need to put a stop to this.
[That's why I am asking you to join me in supporting Congressman Lee Zeldin to be our next Governor of New York.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PdxK7SFf7EDh1Na8QuApEnGrV40mf78dLW3XQFURdJuajKUcr40oPwiE3OtpjBjyVfmNAW2NUrD7hdI8dSj9M4Ri505WMWDVtLfKlH2sjTChS3z580z6K_Px_-sq1UlDzhKJGxkHbLEWpcwT8EapL6_kLxL9iEkZ9d8-ufxSUCuXamEbRrq92GJWVRSbR2faQmRhwDnGZfxC_mnEJEZfUA==&c=byoM2nzDCwvMFWEwWCT2oRt7zDA0EScpQOTv2p4ccaDIVEJOOjZU-g==&ch=KlqDHWz0m_juNFzdPsNNfEWh1fLAydm0MrJivKzAPBMjFm9tJT2mig==)
New York needs a battle-tested leader like Lee Zeldin to be in the Governor's Office to get this state back on track and make quality of life a priority.
---
---
| [Make A Contribution To Support Our Next Governor Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PdxK7SFf7EDh1Na8QuApEnGrV40mf78dLW3XQFURdJuajKUcr40oPwiE3OtpjBjyVfmNAW2NUrD7hdI8dSj9M4Ri505WMWDVtLfKlH2sjTChS3z580z6K_Px_-sq1UlDzhKJGxkHbLEWpcwT8EapL6_kLxL9iEkZ9d8-ufxSUCuXamEbRrq92GJWVRSbR2faQmRhwDnGZfxC_mnEJEZfUA==&c=byoM2nzDCwvMFWEwWCT2oRt7zDA0EScpQOTv2p4ccaDIVEJOOjZU-g==&ch=KlqDHWz0m_juNFzdPsNNfEWh1fLAydm0MrJivKzAPBMjFm9tJT2mig==)
---
|
---
| As your Senator, I will continue to fight every day to give families a voice, support our farms and small businesses, protect our freedoms, defend our law enforcement officers and ensure a bright future for the next generation of New Yorkers.
God Bless,
---
---
|
### Rob Ortt
### Senate Republican Leader

body:

| | Peter, 40,000 belligerent young men have recently joined up with far-right extremist group The Proud Boys, which now boasts well over 40 chapters nationwide. Look, these people aren't messing around. Donald Trump — who urged his Proud Boys supporters to storm the Capitol on January 6 and then delayed calling in the National Guard to give the Proud Boys time and cover — just tapped Herschel Walker to oust Raphael Warnock. And CBS News reports that in the first weeks of his campaign, Walker has raised an eye-popping $3.7 million. Hershel Walker easily inherited Donald Trump's riled up Proud Boys base. One of Walker's high-dollar donors— who had a swastika as her Twitter profile photo— said “I specifically chose that symbol as an artistic protest.” Now Walker refuses to apologize to the rightfully furious Jewish community. Raphael Warnock poses such a serious threat to the GOP establishment that Republicans are running anybody they can find who can galvanize Trump's best friends: The Proud Boys. Remember, members of The Proud Boys have repeatedly threatened Warnock's life online, writing “Dead men can't pass laws.” The Proud Boys represent the only path forward for the Party of Trump. And if Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, voting rights. Goodbye, gun reform. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, and hundreds of people have donated, but up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. We need absolutely everybody to go all-in to reelect Raphael Warnock. We noticed that YOU stepped up BIG TIME in 2020, Peter. Please, there has never been a more important moment to bring back that same energy than RIGHT NOW. With America's future hanging in the balance of the US Senate and Trump's return to politics, we're asking you directly: Will you rush in $1, $5, $25, $100, or whatever you can spare right now? **[Stand with us, Peter: Please donate right now to help us prevent dark GOP Nazi-sympathizers' money from installing Hershel Walker in Raphael Warnock's seat. Remember, members of The Proud Boys have repeatedly threatened Warnock's life online, writing “Dead men can't pass laws.” The Proud Boys represent the only path forward for the Party of Trump. And if Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, voting rights. Goodbye, gun reform. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, and hundreds of people have donated, but up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. We need absolutely everybody to go all-in to reelect Raphael Warnock. We noticed that YOU stepped up BIG TIME in 2020, Peter. Please, there has never been a more important moment to bring back that same energy than RIGHT NOW. With America's future hanging in the balance of the US Senate and Trump's return to politics, we're asking you directly: Will you rush in $1, $5, $25, $100, or whatever you can spare right now? = | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Raphael Warnock is counting on us to watch his back, Peter. Thank you for refusing to let him down. Thank you for everything. — When Democrats Turn Out = | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. All contributions are made to support When Democrats Turn Out PAC's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. body:
Donald Trump recently filed a lawsuit claiming executive privilege so that White House records relating to the insurrection cannot be accessed by the House commission. Trump is trying to outright impede -- or at a minimum slow down -- the investigation because he knows he has something to hide. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37870587/313008517/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3ZGRjN2IwLWQyMzQtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=66UcvVCjOoUZWwJESLkqmPo-uTmikBTjBJnPHZrSlrQ=&emci=45881f77-4733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=67ddc7b0-d234-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001) **ICYMI: Trump sues to prevent the House commission from obtaining records related to January 6**
This is important, so we wanted to make sure you didn't miss the news, team.

Donald Trump recently filed a lawsuit claiming executive privilege so that White House records relating to the insurrection cannot be accessed by the House commission. Trump is trying to outright impede -- or at a minimum slow down -- the investigation because he knows he has something to hide.

If his lawsuit is successful, we may never know the full extent of Trump's involvement in the January 6 attack on our nation's Capitol. We need to fight back and send a message that we won't allow Trump or any of his cronies to get in the way of the truth and that we demand accountability for their attacks on our democracy.

body:
View in browser (https://d2pqFK04.na1.hubspotlinksstarter.com/Btc/RJ+113/d2pqFK04/VW2f0F6CSlkPW9dFN-y45tnBrW6N147h4z25HJN6TZ7st5jyM_V3Zsc37CgCpKW6J4wDj6x64zpW88vHpj85Kb6BW9hsmG58tqbYFN45Ypw1BdmPqV1KxkF4Nmv7PMLKxf2qLl6FW2sT5zt58VQ2ZW5LF4Z23JHbpHW74X5jh5fshcbN14mSK_NYmSlVjDcRj2hBdXCW21y9db6qt_xdW57433F5jGbFwW24DG855SFzJZW3Lt0fl5dMnvYW1jhGVX8pz30_VBXLtG4g-YXnW2k0mq93hGxYjVWvYfY6LdslcW4Snx_W8f4dCGV7Nxlq8-C0dJN6lVt1cm6H-_W86jCdD9dBts_W8LKz113sx5ZCW6mb1b38yVK11W5Sm5Mt2SSRZbW7tjtzG2B6bF6W55dvZ83j_ZvfW7_p3qz6N3BPpN6l-qyYR_DVWW1KPcb_5MRPCGW6BWBQv52VyDhN4jHzyGf23WKW4RLk5W3SbRlQW6_WRmt2MdBLmN79BNy93cs8ZW4qS0Gx9cTcqcW2jS0L47dShWtW4kv_P44P1qBnW16gfb03cCYfP35PY1 )

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

MARK PUKITA FOR SENATE 2022

CONTACT:

Robert Gray

press@mark4ohio.com

(614) 946-0949

CCV Displays Anything but "Christian Virtue" in WOKE-like Cancellation of Pukita From U.S. Senate Forum Event.

On Friday, October 22 at 5:31 PM, without notice, consultation, or offer of remediation, the Center for Christian Virtue (CCV) summarily and illegally CANCELED Senate Candidate Mark Pukita from their October 24, 2021, U.S. Senate Candidate Forum event. Pukita had purchased a Patron Sponsorship.

In their cancelation, they FALSELY labeled Mark Pukita ad content, that had been accepted and approved, as anti-Semitic. How false was the CCV claim? CCV's media partner, Salem Media, broke with CCV and is still running Mr. Pukita's ads.

Previously, the same CCV had fraudulently prevented Pukita from participating in the main forum.

Mark Pukita's team has notified local CCV and local law enforcement that they will peacefully arrive and expect to be afforded the benefits of their legal contract.

The fraudulent omission, the contract, and what will happen on October 24 are all covered below.

Pukita Fraudulently Omitted from the Main Stage of the October 24 U.S. Senate Candidate Forum

Mark was blocked from participating, on the main stage, by a CCV who wrote rules to keep Mark, a "citizen candidate," out while letting a never-Trumper candidate, who just declared and had no FEC reporting, in after other candidates (Matt Dolan).

Despite repeated requests, CCV did not give Mark the criteria to be accepted into the event until September 27 which was after CCV had already set a candidate list (save for Matt Dolan who they let in later) and done in mailings. Had Mark Pukita been told the criteria, in a timely fashion, he could have easily met the criteria (which would have merely involved a money transfer as, except for a special Dolan rule, the criteria were purely financial).

An examination of the information provided to Mark by CCV, and dated August 15, 2021, shows the underlying Word document of criteria was actually created hours before being sent to Mark. It was fraud and deception, by a supposed Christian virtue group, to block the only candidate critical of Ohio Republican Party corruption, critical of Rob Portman and who brings real policy (see note).

- See the documents and analysis exposing CCVs fraud here: https://d2pqFK04.na1.hubspotlinksstarter.com/Btc/RJ+113/d2pqFK04/VW2f0F6CSlkPW9dFN-y45tnBrW6N147h4z25HJN6TZ7st3l0fQV1-WJV7CgY0FMwFjmdW13XhN2lgzlxQV8V9W3ZqtjP2GLcRrW2bYkBn8d38NdW3cM8VT4mLSgDW5T78l-5_SfbKW1K1y4N5TNMppW7_x3WK3d-4tRW6TDYLL752KLgW8Z09jS3fWXCdW2tl9v040nK-7W3SD_c-1jdvSTW59_YDW71zbfYW2y3fQX5FwjglW4gt0WS2G3LvgW2d4w6x1CMmqsW865Ym42CG4hFW3JFp6Q22CGZSW56XRk73_wfCvW90rTp73swxxDW2JlyJC2lXN8HW77BknQ3VpwQQW3kYB5k5NgbqQW38TNsj4s73mt3jsR1
- See Mark Pukita's interactive policy guide: https://d2pqFK04.na1.hubspotlinksstarter.com/Btc/RJ+113/d2pqFK04/VW2f0F6CSlkPW9dFN-y45tnBrW6N147h4z25HJN6TZ7s93l0fwV1-WJV7CgBGpW5pJrkK4H_cP6N2xXhnD_LMYZW4syP758m4rC-W51l5XJ5mjQJNW8pMn7S5_7x6WW3m7Lx04Fp6TgW1px-JL38JzdXW7ZY1f13LDGKzW8WSMxh4yg8HlN5XpTyG4zvFLVHTVyG65_RWWW64-GK-4vpR1bW3q0wqV78RcRnW41MhNH2Jp2dFW2qPMlP8m_qQcW5-F64k9lyTNwW47XwJL6RypWvW6W-ZSn452BZ0N7sBbqcChrR-W5GZFy-19xV3GN599hX1_fVYcW4l1YR04HMGXc3bTD1

Pukita's Patron Sponsorship Arbitrarly Rescinded with Fake Claim of Anti-Semitism (as Salem Media disagrees with CCV)

Mark Pukita's Patron Sponsorship was summarily and illegally rescinded, by CCV, on Friday, October 22, 2021, after business hours.

The reason given was a false and defamatory claim against Mark. The claim was that an ad, already submitted and approved, was now anti-Semitic and a basis to cancel not just the ad but all elements of Pukita's participation.

The ad contains this line:

"Are we seriously supposed to believe the most Christian Values Senate candidate is Jewish? I am so sick of these phony caricatures."

Josh Mandel's bizarre campaign, aimed at and pandering to Christian Evangelicals, has made many people uneasy and scratching their heads. It is a 100% legitimate issue. Per Mark Pukita,

"Mandel is a career politician and an actor. He has been an actor throughout his career. He dances for applause. He has already lost for U.S. Senate in a General Election and, if he wins the primary, he will lose again. Too many Ohioans see through the act. My ad reflects what many grassroots voters are already talking about. An uneasiness with Josh who professes family values on one hand but, on the other, has a toxic campaign environment due to his romantic personal relationships with campaign staff." (see footnote)

Mark Pukita is absolutely, unequivocally, undeniably a complete supporter of religious tolerance and of Israel. He is not a supporter of phonies and panderers.

An anti-Semitism claim against Mark Pukita is ridiculous and defamatory. CCV offered no explanation, no conversation, no remediation. They were looking for any excuse to keep Pukita out. They made one up.

It gets better: Salem Media, the media partner for the event broke ranks with CCV and is airing the Pukita commercials as planned. Their split speaks volumes to the fraud of CCV's position.

CCV's counsel, John Hart, is the same person involved in unethically blocking Mark Pukita from the main event.

- Footnote on toxic Mandel campaign - Dispatch article: https://d2pqFK04.na1.hubspotlinksstarter.com/Btc/RJ+113/d2pqFK04/VW2f0F6CSlkPW9dFN-y45tnBrW6N147h4z25HJN6TZ7rh5jyLQV3Zsc37CgDQdW1SxJrd8zZjbBW3T1f7r7K7tVZN8SxSThd1LH7W8ZFMtf7G2_5CW3DRbfM8dcx6WW7nCFqG4f2C1VW3zPhgj1X4qttN3dxXJ9BttjXW68h3vK6RRr6_W239Wjh6q19DtN3wNyZb4jRZQW4WJQdb43bLc9N2WvW4p-NRwLW46H4f96J6JJ1W84H5Kp76qf5JW1lfQCn5YN7BPV7szR11JT_21W2X85dk44D2r-W3mh2nw6gCNP8N3TMhPvS2Dx9W4XDSR17xSBX0W1HpfQz19J8QPW1KsYtq8P1z6yW6HwysJ8fYQ4CW733P7v7jHzRxW1fdsrZ5LwYSJW67rGjh2kR07dW6Q6DDy1-J4xsW1LczSP1QjQBPW4ksgcy2ntmBkVRDpvM4bz0h3Vm-fl54HZkwk3kP81
- Listen to Pukita's ads here (the Mandel ad is the last of three): https://d2pqFK04.na1.hubspotlinksstarter.com/Btc/RJ+113/d2pqFK04/VW2f0F6CSlkPW9dFN-y45tnBrW6N147h4z25HJN6TZ7rV3l0fcV1-WJV7CgZG0W1jn9X58W7tsbW4BKxr11LyYyGW866XYr5-jF2vW8Z8Wd26WMHP7W57PqDh7NN0MVW4nffhZ2R7Xp8Mxpt3my9DkhW97rhbN5H8yZhVVdzYC619tzpVCSD4x1nrpcDW75-HKp8czmTHW85vBRk1hxBjGW8X638l4Spg9cW7BdblB1JGc6fW5YLhrQ4t60QSW7qXNs71_hJ5xW2k8Z7l7cnw3CN3kPSpZCLgjnVrzlGj5gnLnCW3PhkmG2vt2gg3hsB1
- Pukita's legal contract with CCV is here: https://d2pqFK04.na1.hubspotlinksstarter.com/Btc/RJ+113/d2pqFK04/VW2f0F6CSlkPW9dFN-y45tnBrW6N147h4z25HJN6TZ7st3l0fQV1-WJV7CgGhqW6zxSCZ3qjPQpW8Hk5Px7KVBClW2SLvmS6md-hhVFnZL21v7ffsW4WG2Rq3sx_y6W8rTBPM2x3BFXW3rt9902BTp5bW5pvs3W68502tW5ZJB1-7DnlwtW2BnCdJ1LkkKSW7KRSFW2CV8XsW2-wkRK5rc0lKW1QPT2k6CspmlN3FB3Q8Hr8xQW3jVw7f2m5dVhW66xK4C5jFm_bW5h3wXM3LtCTFW61t6lb2NKpdbW2M7mKf3wtVn0W7D2_j72ttHBKW3Cqzfy3QH3k6W14n3w-6BnhKTW47mTB82WfzKKN7hn1ZfwcNnB3b9K1

What Will Happen Today?

Pukita's Team will Show-up Peacefully

The following has been communicated to CCV's legal counsel, by Mark Pukita's legal counsel, regarding today, October 24:

Mr. Hart:

Thank you for quickly responding to my original email. After consulting with my client, it is the intention of the Mark Pukita for US Senate 2022 Committee to still arrive at the event tomorrow with the expectation of receiving the contract's full benefits as a Patron Sponsor. My client is hopeful that CCV will reverse its unlawful stance, as to not create any embarrassment to CCV.

There will likely be two distinct timeframes: booth set-up (3:00-4:15 p.m.) when two representatives of the Pukita campaign will arrive and the VIP dinner (5:00 p.m.) when Alicia and Joe Healy are planning to arrive.

My client fully understands that CCV may very likely still deny entry of his team as a Patron Sponsor and as VIP ticket holders. My client wants you to know that they are not looking to cause any disturbance at the event and if denied entry and/or asked to leave they will comply. However, the Pukita campaign does intend to create an audio/video record of any interactions denying their entrance as a Patron Sponsor, so as to fully preserve all current and future legal rights.

Additionally, several Pukita team members have now purchased individual tickets based on your previous correspondence. So, they will return to the event with those tickets if denied access as a Patron Sponsor. Again, they will be non-disruptive.

As a courtesy, we will be notifying the local police of our intentions of arriving at the event with the expectation of receiving all benefits under the contract (but expecting to be asked to leave by CCV). My client also intends to notify the press.

Again, my client requests that you reverse your unlawful stance and honor his lawful contract as a Patron Sponsor.

Mark Pukita for US Senate 2022 Committee, 4467 Donegal Cliffs Drive, Dublin, Ohio 43017, USA, (614) 946-0949

clean_body: View in browser ( ) FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MARK PUKITA FOR SENATE 2022 CONTACT: Robert Gray press@mark4ohio.com (614) 946-0949 CCV Displays Anything but "Christian Virtue" in WOKE-like Cancellation of Pukita From U.S. Senate Forum Event. On Friday, October 22 at 5:31 PM, without notice, consultation, or offer of remediation, the Center for Christian Virtue (CCV) summarily and illegally CANCELED Senate Candidate Mark Pukita from their October 24, 2021, U.S. Senate Candidate Forum event. Pukita had purchased a Patron Sponsorship. In their cancelation, they FALSELY labeled Mark Pukita ad content, that had been accepted and approved, as anti-Semitic. How false was the CCV claim? CCV's media partner, Salem Media, broke with CCV and is still running Mr. Pukita's ads. Previously, the same CCV had fraudulently prevented Pukita from participating in the main forum. Mark Pukita's team has notified local CCV and local law enforcement that they will peacefully arrive and expect to be afforded the benefits of their legal contract. The fraudulent omission, the contract, and what will happen on October 24 are all covered below. Pukita Fraudulently Omitted from the Main Stage of the October 24 U.S. Senate Candidate Forum Mark was blocked from participating, on the main stage, by a CCV who wrote rules to keep Mark, a "citizen candidate," out while letting a never-Trumper candidate, who just declared and had no FEC reporting, in after other candidates (Matt Dolan). Despite repeated requests, CCV did not give Mark the criteria to be accepted into the event until September 27 which was after CCV had already set a candidate list (save for Matt Dolan who they let in later) and done in mailings. Had Mark Pukita been told the criteria, in a timely fashion, he could have easily met the criteria (which would have merely involved a money transfer as, except for a special Dolan rule, the criteria were purely financial). An examination of the information provided to Mark by CCV, and dated August 15, 2021, shows the underlying Word document of criteria was actually created hours before being sent to Mark. It was fraud and deception, by a supposed Christian virtue group, to block the only candidate critical of Ohio Republican Party corruption, critical of Rob Portman and who brings real policy (see note). - See the documents and analysis exposing CCVs fraud here: - See Mark Pukita's interactive policy guide: Pukita's Patron Sponsorship Arbitrarly Rescinded with Fake Claim of Anti-Semitism (as Salem Media disagrees with CCV) Mark Pukita's Patron Sponsorship was summarily and illegally rescinded, by CCV, on Friday, October 22, 2021, after business hours. The reason given was a false and defamatory claim against Mark. The claim was that an ad, already submitted and approved, was now anti-Semitic and a basis to cancel not just the ad but all elements of Pukita's participation. The ad contains this line: "Are we seriously supposed to believe the most Christian Values Senate candidate is Jewish? I am so sick of these phony caricatures." Josh Mandel's bizarre campaign, aimed at and pandering to Christian Evangelicals, has made many people uneasy and scratching their heads. It is a 100% legitimate issue. Per Mark Pukita, "Mandel is a career politician and an actor. He has been an actor throughout his career. He dances for applause. He has already lost for U.S. Senate in a General Election and, if he wins the primary, he will lose again. Too many Ohioans see through the act. My ad reflects what many grassroots voters are already talking about. An uneasiness with Josh who professes family values on one hand but, on the other, has a toxic campaign environment due to his romantic personal relationships with campaign staff." (see footnote) Mark Pukita is absolutely, unequivocally, undeniably a complete supporter of religious tolerance and of Israel. He is not a supporter of phonies and panderers. An anti-Semitism claim against Mark Pukita is ridiculous and defamatory. CCV offered no explanation, no conversation, no remediation. They were looking for any excuse to keep Pukita out. They made one up. It gets better: Salem Media, the media partner for the event broke ranks with CCV and is airing the Pukita commercials as planned. Their split speaks volumes to the fraud of CCV's position. CCV's counsel, John Hart, is the same person involved in unethically blocking Mark Pukita from the main event. - Footnote on toxic Mandel campaign - Dispatch article: - Listen to Pukita's ads here (the Mandel ad is the last of three): - Pukita's legal contract with CCV is here: What Will Happen Today? Pukita's Team will Show-up Peacefully The following has been communicated to CCV's legal counsel, by Mark Pukita's legal counsel, regarding today, October 24: Mr. Hart: Thank you for quickly responding to my original email. After consulting with my client, it is the intention of the Mark Pukita for US Senate 2022 Committee to still arrive at the event tomorrow with the expectation of receiving the contract's full benefits as a Patron Sponsor. My client is hopeful that CCV will reverse its unlawful stance, as to not create any embarrassment to CCV. There will likely be two distinct timeframes: booth set-up (3:00-4:15 p.m.) when two representatives of the Pukita campaign will arrive and the VIP dinner (5:00 p.m.) when Alicia and Joe Healy are planning to arrive. My client fully understands that CCV may very likely still deny entry of his team as a Patron Sponsor and as VIP ticket holders. My client wants you to know that they are not looking to cause any disturbance at the event and if denied entry and/or asked to leave they will comply. However, the Pukita campaign does intend to create an audio/video record of any interactions denying their entrance as a Patron Sponsor, so as to fully preserve all current and future legal rights. Additionally, several Pukita team members have now purchased individual tickets based on your previous correspondence. So, they will return to the event with those tickets if denied access as a Patron Sponsor. Again, they will be non-disruptive. As a courtesy, we will be notifying the local police of our intentions of arriving at the event with the expectation of receiving all benefits under the contract (but expecting to be asked to leave by CCV). My client also intends to notify the press. Again, my client requests that you reverse your unlawful stance and honor his lawful contract as a Patron Sponsor. Mark Pukita for US Senate 2022 Committee, 4467 Donegal Cliffs Drive, Dublin, Ohio 43017, USA, (614) 946-0949

body:
I'm heading to Green Bay and thought I would write to you from the road. I hate bugging you on a weekend, but I have an important favor to ask if you've got a second. Good morning!

I'm heading to Green Bay to cheer on the Packers (I'm so excited to be back at Lambeau this season!). I hate to bug you this early on a weekend, but I need to ask a quick favor before today's game begins.

My team and I have set an ambitious goal of collecting 5,000 online donations before October ends. The problem is, we’re only about 68% of the way there. **[So, I’m sincerely asking you to chip in today. Dear Friend, Yesterday, we kicked off the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour with a prayer surrounded by family, friends, and supporters at the Great Falls Freedom Memorial. What started as a campaign has turned into a movement - a movement led by you, the great people of the Commonwealth of Virginia. We've got just 9 days left, and I hope you will join me at one of our 50 stops.
---
---
| [ **BUS TOUR** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VVLQNk6v1r_MW79Zb1-52-cVXW4Rs6st4z26vrN1f4_XG3lSbNV1-WJV7CgV6PW4Z4lxd7981TXW9dp_p-2ZhPnxW4dXNPR7ysBwKW7yK70l91JtkyW49kS577SZQzMW4yGPdg7Nq8NPW8wvCtx3PyjW1W2b0qQp59l4kHW5h7j202YBmR7W5GBn5l6fYF8dW6Zd7N67z_YHsW4h4RZ93yKQZLW5XsMlD31jq-fW4hNsRM7x9-skW3PXBNr2Y2HGgVXtLNJ6Q7rZkW3_kQRt3cYdRRW2_cSmK5yB6pYW67X6Gv11MNgTW542Jrz8f4LGzW7_Kn4v4hZJcWVRkl2913XQk03bzP1)
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
---
---
After leaving the Freedom Memorial, we headed south - stopping in Hanover, Richmond City, Chesterfield County, and Henrico - speaking with voters about what matters most to them. Safer communities, excellence in education, a thriving economy. It's clear Virginians are ready for a change.
---
---
At every stop the energy is exhilarating, and our movement continues to grow and gain momentum. If you didn't get a chance to join us on day one, check out our [website](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VVLQNk6v1r_MW79Zb1-52-cVXW4Rs6st4z26vrN1f4_Xm3lSbtV1-WJV7CgCm-W4KND_S3ts7y4W4TPVC74cLNvSW3vW_JM5hthP3VbhB7r3t5QpbW7r0VFW8-rhGBW4LCgW37DkyLkW7kY9Fd8nWqYNW87p8XV4Ddz0SN77hBGsHPDwSVM1GzL2kPxTRW8NG4qY51rzp9N4lBWPC7DZR_W5fzKzh7-RJb5W12SSmp3WKftCW41m0MY1hN0m5VYkcby89215DW2DCrNg5Qr7dmW8v772h8tg4z0N7rPNTpYlJt4W4bdqpZ7FGKzc32Pg1) or join us today in Yorktown, Newport News, or Chesapeake.
---
There are so many fired up voters who are ready to make Virginia the best place in America to live, work, and raise a family. On November 2nd, a new day begins in Virginia! For Virginia,
---
---
Glenn Youngkin
---
[ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VVLQNk6v1r_MW79Zb1-52-cVXW4Rs6st4z26vrN1f4_XG3lSbNV1-WJV7CgWxbW5j1V-M5Z7r3hW4N_czb2N4_07W57kFPz5MwnxHW6sFHbW8vsRrcN335WZHD-NrfW57GHW85ycwKfVlStyz3wQQJKW36gyM_5DhQvVW2FWVkc277-W1W1Wn9CF8Ljs9PW5sRBTZ2Cxb2YVGHcpd6kh26XW8Gh6c2826ybNW2fdm0X8CCpDfVQWf0D5Q-p9qW8PRghb4jpLw7W7sdCYg3_5jsdVMtksx8pFJVpW72vB425xjNX2W2MVL0y6yNTpfW7rd94Y22DB2zN6F6z26ncZ7x39sj1)

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37872971/313018387/-1739877693?refcode=20211024_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDQyNTYzOC1kYTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nZzB9har7UzlbbakOq2iNd9bSGJpWaJOWzwHHRhbLw0=) Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.** [**I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37872972/313018388/-68044773?refcode=20211024_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDQyNTYzOC1kYTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nZzB9har7UzlbbakOq2iNd9bSGJpWaJOWzwHHRhbLw0=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37872976/313018389/-1739877693?refcode=20211024_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDQyNTYzOC1kYTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nZzB9har7UzlbbakOq2iNd9bSGJpWaJOWzwHHRhbLw0=)
Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. clean_body: | | | = Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. = = Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. = Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zveahn0k520te98g3d04u6ffgdpf6g14cobmikp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1geeor4sjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdrcqkjqie7ok7ljrte5r2p1pto21529b628la1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1geeor4sjh2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeomrrgr0ii5rap2v1q9a8aseuk3m0v0vq141eho_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1geeor4sjh2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z12gddqrm26bb9o8ghha8gejlggiiejhugod65ug_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1geeor4sjh2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zthdedqu2ml88c2i5p0e8br7ahej89kbarq1jeoo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1geeor4sjh2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z57n7v2pn4qs54sltc512e76a79hmt7udqqrh28o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1geeor4sjh2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpi51apcm9s10mmlo0anohq1coe4polm1ffhmmmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1geeor4sjh2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
