clean_body: Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. The New York Times’ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” “Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.” Outrageous! The New York Times’ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times’ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline for you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. body:
Team,
I hope you’re having a great weekend. I’m just sitting down to enjoy a Sunday morning cafecito and catch up on email. I figured I’d take a minute to fill you in on where things stand with the campaign.
We’re just one week away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline (and one week away from Halloween!), and based on my back-of-the-napkin math at my kitchen table, we need to pull in another $40,000 online this week to hit our goal.
We’ll be in touch throughout the week with updates, but I figured I’d give you a head start. If you can spare a donation, please click here to chip in and help us start the week strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1024alicia]
Thanks--and enjoy the rest of your Sunday!
Alicia Pardo

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd9m8f2d7nklai1b3oo34uub5p92tlv89m4aab5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1geeor0s9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaa5fibngs7h3o61b68hb3t3jtlloa840pik2nfg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1geeor0s9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc181dgbft1ngpqrfgeltdmdc3v088lov8akqd8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1geeor0s9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
| | |

Here's the deal, team: **news outlets across the country, from _The Hill_ to _CNN_ , all confirm that this race is going to be one of – if not the tightest in the country.** With the Senate majority split 50-50, Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to turn the Senate red. Republicans know that New Hampshire is their best shot at retaking control, and they're going to do whatever it takes. Trump's allies have already visited New Hampshire multiple times to rally their base, and One Nation, a McConnell-linked super PAC, recently announced a $10 million ad buy to flip the Senate. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: I’m writing to ask if you will please split a donation between Val Demings’ campaign for Senate in Florida and my campaign in North Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
When we win these races and elect Val and me to the U.S. Senate, know it was your early investment and belief that made it possible.
#

I’m writing to ask if you will **[please split a $10 donation between Val Demings’ campaign for Senate in Florida and my campaign in North Carolina.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37880883/313035889/1427768078?refcode2=a13818e1-e534-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211024-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM4MThlMS1lNTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZP0_1gPNJkixVrPesJAbUz4yo5vXiNYgQr6a0--jQk=)** Please let me explain why your contribution is so important — especially today.
North Carolina and Florida’s Senate races will be among the most competitive and expensive in the country this cycle. Winning these seats will be key to expanding Democrats’ majority.
We recently got incredible news about Val’s race that I wanted to make sure you saw. **A new poll shows Val Demings down by just 2% to Marco Rubio — within the margin of error!**
Val is an incredible candidate. She’s a U.S. Congresswoman who before that rose through the ranks to become Orlando’s first female Chief of Police. I know she has what it takes to win this race and defeat Marco Rubio.
But with a 50-50 margin in the Senate, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are going to spend obscene amounts of money trying to drag her name through the mud. Just like Republicans are coming after me, they’re coming after Val.
So I am asking for your support to ensure we have the resources to fight back:
**[Can you please split a $10 donation between Val Demings and my campaign? We must be ready for anything Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies throw our way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37880885/313035892/1427768078?refcode2=a13818e1-e534-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211024-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM4MThlMS1lNTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZP0_1gPNJkixVrPesJAbUz4yo5vXiNYgQr6a0--jQk=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37880888/313035894/1427768078?refcode2=a13818e1-e534-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211024-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM4MThlMS1lNTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZP0_1gPNJkixVrPesJAbUz4yo5vXiNYgQr6a0--jQk=)**
At a moment when there are no African American women in the Senate, representation matters more than ever. We know we get better policy outcomes when the people writing our laws understand the challenges facing our families and reflect the diversity of America.
But the unfortunate reality is that for African American women, raising money has been among the biggest obstacles we face when running for office.
This is our opportunity to change all that and send two African American women to the Senate. Can we count on your support?
**[Can you please split a $10 donation between Val Demings' and my campaigns today? We’re counting on lots of individual donations to make sure we have what it takes to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37880891/313035898/1427768078?refcode2=a13818e1-e534-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211024-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM4MThlMS1lNTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZP0_1gPNJkixVrPesJAbUz4yo5vXiNYgQr6a0--jQk=)**
When we win, Val and I will be strong partners in the Senate in the fight for justice, and you can be sure that it was your early investment and faith that made it possible.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37880894/313035901/1427768078?refcode2=a13818e1-e534-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211024-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM4MThlMS1lNTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZP0_1gPNJkixVrPesJAbUz4yo5vXiNYgQr6a0--jQk=)**

* * *

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I'm sincerely asking you to contribute $3 to our campaign before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I’m never going to have the kind of wealth to self-fund, and I refuse to take corporate PAC money
#

Can I be completely honest with you?
Running in a competitive race for U.S. Senate requires an outrageous amount of money.
Like the kind of money that, traditionally, only wealthy candidates could afford to put up.
That’s why there are so few working people in Congress in the first place — but we’re going to fix that.
As of today, we’re 77% of the way through October, but we’re only 57% of the way to our fundraising goal for the month. Which means we’re going to need a surge of support today to catch up.
**So we set an ambitious goal of 1,000 donations before the end of the day to get us back on track. There’s so much at stake in this race, so I must ask you directly.**
[Can you please pitch in $3 to my campaign for U.S. Senate before midnight? **Obama's message was clear: we can’t be tired! We need to get out there and get to work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot and keep Virginia on the path to a better future.**
So much is on the ballot in this election. Healthcare for people with pre-existing conditions, a woman’s right to choose, and historic gun violence prevention measures that we need to keep us safe. All of this is on the line in less than 10 days from now, so we need to get fired up to vote for Democrats and do everything we can to win this election.
[**Will you please heed Obama’s message and rush in a donation right now to help us keep Virginia blue? There’s no time to wait. The future of Virginia and the future of our country is on the line now, and we can’t be tired.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37881180/313037593/415374601?refcode=E12017-20211023-Obama-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDI0MGEwNC1lOTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4AQXMMJ4P2IoOLvcne7kdMhZFDDohTWfS490-ms2lCI=)

At last week’s Donald Trump rally for Glenn Youngkin, attendees kicked off the event by pledging allegiance to a flag from the deadly January 6th insurrection.

Later, Donald Trump called into the event and said that Glenn Youngkin would “do all of the things we want a Governor to do.”

Derek, this is not who we are as Virginians or Americans. I’m not about to let Donald Trump or Glenn Youngkin attack our democracy and I’m asking for your help.

| | Folks, I grew up working on a farm in Pembroke, North Carolina -- the son and grandson of sharecroppers. At a young age, I was taught to respect folks who work long, hard hours -- in rain, snow, heat -- just to make a living for their family. My parents showed me the meaning of hard work -- and thanks to their support, I became a special education teacher, then a proud small business owner, and served my community in the General Assembly for the past ten years. Now, I’m running for Congress to make sure every child can reach their fullest potential like I did with the help of my family and community. I never imagined a Lumbee like me, the son and grandson of sharecroppers, would have a shot at becoming the first Native American to represent North Carolina in Congress.

name: Christy Smith
subject: My daughters. My friends' daughters. The country's daughters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37881685/313041237/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJhYWY0MS1lYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eaQ7SFkvxGMtkUhLCO7RYK5p2kswJw2eWPUmm-H13Qs=&emci=536adcf0-4d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c4baaf41-ec34-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

A few weeks ago, I attended the Women's March to advocate for reproductive freedom where I told my personal story. And while I was telling my story, I couldn't help but reflect on the reason I ran.

_My daughters._

My daughters are the reason I decided to run for office. Because in 2016, on that damned night as we watched Donald Trump become the president, I watched the horror spread across the faces of my daughters as they quickly realized what this would mean for them.

I ran because of my daughters. I ran because of my friends' daughters. I ran because of my neighbors' daughters. **I ran because of our country's daughters.**

**This fight is for our daughters. For their futures, and the futures of their daughters. We're fighting to ensure our daughters and all of the daughters after them have autonomy over their bodies.**

**[I know we can win this -- but I can't win without you on my team. Will you chip in $5 and help me fight for our daughters and the ones yet to come?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37881686/313041238/-1056200607?refcode=em21_211024_whyiran&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJhYWY0MS1lYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eaQ7SFkvxGMtkUhLCO7RYK5p2kswJw2eWPUmm-H13Qs=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37881687/313041239/-1056200607?refcode=em21_211024_whyiran&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJhYWY0MS1lYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eaQ7SFkvxGMtkUhLCO7RYK5p2kswJw2eWPUmm-H13Qs=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37881688/313041240/-1056200607?refcode=em21_211024_whyiran&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJhYWY0MS1lYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eaQ7SFkvxGMtkUhLCO7RYK5p2kswJw2eWPUmm-H13Qs=)

[Express Donate $250](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37881691/313041243/-1056200607?refcode=em21_211024_whyiran&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJhYWY0MS1lYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eaQ7SFkvxGMtkUhLCO7RYK5p2kswJw2eWPUmm-H13Qs=) | [Donate Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37881692/313041244/-1056200607?refcode=em21_211024_whyiran&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJhYWY0MS1lYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eaQ7SFkvxGMtkUhLCO7RYK5p2kswJw2eWPUmm-H13Qs=)

It's no secret what's at stake here, Peter.

With abortion bans going into effect _across the country_ , it's clear that far-right Republicans (cough cough, like Mike Garcia) will stop at absolutely nothing when it comes to infringing on women's rights.

**A future where my daughters or yours do not have the right to make decisions regarding their own bodies is a future that I will not allow.**

**[Please, join me in this fight for the future. Chip in to our campaign now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37881693/313041245/-1056200607?refcode=em21_211024_whyiran&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJhYWY0MS1lYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eaQ7SFkvxGMtkUhLCO7RYK5p2kswJw2eWPUmm-H13Qs=)**

\-- Christy

subject: Join Allison in Grove City today at noon!
body:
We're knocking on doors and making calls all day today! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4a7c3b4ad228/how-to-volunteer-this-weekend-5027281?e=400a181d5a)
### _In Grove City today at 12pm! ⤵️_
---
## Join Allison Russo in Grove City today at 12pm! We’re talking to Democratic voters about the upcoming elections for U.S. Congress and SWCSD Board of Education!
|
---
Wherever there is a Democratic sample ballot, we are carrying those at every canvass! **So by coming out to volunteer, you’ll be helping your local school board, city council, and township trustee candidates as well as Allison Russo.** It’s all hands on deck for the next 10 day, , and there are so many different ways to volunteer. Are you in?
## _Knock on Doors with Local Democrats:_
_Click to sign-up and share with friends:_
* [**Athens County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=bfcb24f5db&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Canal Winchester GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=22e9e01fcf&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Columbus City Coordinated Campaign GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4e665489cf&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Grove City/SWCSD Coordinated GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ef3b032dff&e=400a181d5a)
* _**WITH ALLISON RUSSO THIS SUNDAY AT 12PM!**_
* [**Hilliard Coordinated Campaign GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ebb411354f&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Lancaster GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=984590c480&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Madison County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4b0ceb400f&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Morgan County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b8239ede00&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Pickerington/Violet Twp. Coordinated Campaign GOTV**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=3451548d85&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Ross County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=319560daff&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Upper Arlington/NW Columbus Coordinated Campaign GOTV**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=8699f6511d&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Victorian Village GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=24439e5ff1&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Wilmington GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=966ae5f3a1&e=400a181d5a)

| [VIEW ALL CANVASSES](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=052a2cb14c&e=400a181d5a)
---
## _Make Phone Calls and Send Texts:_
* [**GOTV Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ee09f000a1&e=400a181d5a)**with OPAL!**
* _Trainings are Sunday at 4pm and Tuesday at 6pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Rural Voters for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=537c2e8467&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Monday and Wednesday at 6pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Seniors for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=045cac5cf3&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Students for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=89a86a9666&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**GOTV Text Banks!**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c845370960&e=400a181d5a)
* We have shifts next week and on Election Day!

| [VIEW ALL PHONE BANKS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=23f9b93fbc&e=400a181d5a)
---
## _Write Letters to Neighbors:_
Research shows that neighbor-to-neighbor conversations are some of the most impactful political conversations you can have. The campaign can pay for flashy mailers and TV commercials, but [**only YOU can help us send a letter to your folks.**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=deadcc3748&e=400a181d5a) We'll ask you to write a short note on each letter, and to hand-address each envelope to our targeted voter list. This, along with a return address folks can recognize, makes a huge difference.
_Letters should be mailed no later than October 27th_
| [VIEW TEMPLATE LETTER AND SIGN UP](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4bb9bacc44&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | | | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4ca4cf127c&e=400a181d5a)| [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=637c5d843d&e=400a181d5a)| [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ed9684d690&e=400a181d5a)
---|---|---
| | |
---
_Copyright (C) 2021 RUSSO FOR CONGRESS. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website or a campaign event.

Our mailing address is:
RUSSO FOR CONGRESS545 E Town StColumbus, OH 43215-4801
[Add us to your address book](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=7a05a909d1) or [unsubscribe](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=7a05a909d1)

Peter, I can’t believe we are just nine days away from Election Day.

It’s truly been a wild ride, and I’m so grateful to have had you by my side every step of the way, _but it’s not over yet._

[**Can you chip in $3 to help me win this race? We’re just $4,380 short of our $30,000 goal, and we need to get there by midnight if we want to pull this off!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37882454/313044854/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211024_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDkzNjQwNy1mMDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dFzKalEwiRdOyZ3FX060QnP6-25KqFzbmspToq7EOY4=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3 TO DEMOCRAT HALA AYALA »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37882456/313044857/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211024_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDkzNjQwNy1mMDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dFzKalEwiRdOyZ3FX060QnP6-25KqFzbmspToq7EOY4=)

**The stakes right now are higher than ever.**

_Voting rights_ are on the line.
_Reproductive justice_ is on the line.
_Affordable health care_ is on the line.
_Gun violence prevention_ is on the line.

It matters who we elect. If my extreme opponent wins on November 2nd, all of these issues will be in danger of Republican takedown.

[**So if you’re with me, Peter, will you rush a $3 donation to my campaign? Time is running out, and I can’t make history as Virginia’s first woman and first Afro‐Latina Lt. Governor without your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37882458/313044859/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211024_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDkzNjQwNy1mMDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dFzKalEwiRdOyZ3FX060QnP6-25KqFzbmspToq7EOY4=)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Are you ready to stand up and fight to save America...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lahmeyer for U
body:
| |
---
---
| Dear Friend, As a businessman, Pastor, husband and father of 5 young children, I never thought I would run for public office. I'm certainly no "politician". When I learned that our Republican U.S. Senator James Lankford had voted in the U.S. Senate to certify the fraudulent election of Joe Biden as president despite a mountain of evidence of irregularities, and fraud, in virtually all of the swing states in the 2020 election, I began to think differently. Now, as I see the damage that the policies of the illegitimately installed Biden regime are doing to America I am more certain than ever that I made the right decision when _I decided to challenge senator Lankford in the Oklahoma Republican Primary next year._ I was saddened to learned that our own Senator Lankford - a guy I voted for in the past - was among a handful of Senate Republicans to vote for the insane immigration policies that have illegals flooding our southern border, and now thanks to the Biden administration there are thousands of Afghani immigrants being flown into the country, in secret, **reaffirmed my intention to not only run - but to win.** I shared the shame of all Americans where I saw the US military turn tail and run from Afghanistan, leaving $8 billion worth of sophisticated military equipment behind and turn control of the country over to the most radical Islamic extremists. None of this would've happened without James Lankford's vote to certify the election of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. As gas prices hit an all time high and we are told of coming food shortages as well as the American people's inability to get simple consumer goods due to "supply chain problems" I recall that none of these problems would exist if James Lankford had not voted to certify the election of the Biden regime. As Federal health officials lie to us about the effectiveness of the COVID-19 vaccination as well as seeking to require not only mandatory masks but also mandatory vaccinations, I once again reflect on the way none of this would've happened if the illegitimate election of Joe Biden has not been allowed to stand. **_It 's hard to believe that our own Republican U.S. Senator voted for this disaster._** As an Oklahoman with no political experience, but a firm belief in our U.S. Constitution and to maintaining our personal freedoms, I understand any effort to unseat an elected official in Oklahoma is an uphill battle. **If you check you will find that James Lankford, who 's been in Washington for 10 years too long, has a campaign war chest bulging with $2.4 million in special interest money. Banks, oil companies, Big Pharma, Insurance companies, Defense Contractors and Trial Lawyers have all had their Political Actions Committees pony up to keep James Lankford in the U.S. Senate. What do they get in return?** _At the same time, I am proud of the fact that nearly 4,000 Oklahomans have contributed $450,000 to my grassroots insurgent campaign_ in the brief time that I have been a candidate. I won't take money for the Special Interest corporate PACS. I am going to rely on the people! 95% of what I raised has come from Oklahomans. I have also been gratified to win the endorsement of the Republican county organizations in Logan, McClain and Cimarron counties. My campaign also picked up steam when I was endorsed by General Michael Flynn, President Trump's first National Security Advisor, a great American patriot. My candidacy has also picked up the support of Oklahoma Republican State Chairman John Bennett. Only days ago, **one of President Trump 's oldest friends and advisers, legendary Republican political strategist Roger Stone has agreed to join as a Senior Advisor helping lead our campaign.** Stone is among those that special counsel Robert Mueller's witch-hunt tried to pressure into falsely testifying against President Trump, but failed. Roger Stone is widely respected for having the guts to stand up to these criminals and refuse to lie. I am proud to have him on my team. It's not that I think that James Lankford is a bad man but it's hard to understand how anyone can see what is happening in America today and not realize that our constitutional freedoms are being rapidly erased as the Biden junta, put in place by James Lankford, is literally destroying this country. Despite all of the growing grassroots support for my campaign to get to Washington, where I will stand up and fight the crazy left-wing socialists who want to reverse everything that is great about this country I recognize at the end of the day that **this contest will come down to money.** Without the money to reach every Oklahoma Republican primary voter through television, cable, radio as well as digital advertising no state-wide candidate can win. That's why I am going to come right out and ask you if you will [make a generous contribution](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=7vmke3tov5d6i1kmo&linkid=0&link=03f4df464c0244b68986e60c7b1d8b08) to my vital campaign for the U.S. Senate? This is our last best chance to save this country from the imposition of a Godless socialist agenda which seeks to make us slaves to the state and strip away our freedoms. Won't you chip in to send someone to Washington who, instead of working with the Biden Administration, as our current U.S. senator is doing, will fight their radical agenda tooth and nail? You can contribute [here](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=7vmke3tov5d6i1kmo&linkid=1&link=fad7111f14064c568fb99c0fd9ab8aab). _I am that man. I refuse to see this great country destroyed by those who would end our free speech, take away our right to own firearms for the protection of our families and businesses and force us to be vaccinated despite growing medical evidence that the hastily approved vaccinations do not protect us from this Chinese created virus and may even do more harm than good in terms of injuring and even killing Americans._ I can't tell you how anxious I am to get into this fight and how I am disgusted by the weak-kneed, gutless establishment Republicans who talk a good game when they're back in Oklahoma but then go to Washington where they refuse to fight the left wing policies that are actively wrecking this country and making us a laughingstock around the globe. I cannot do it without your help. [Will you please dig deep and send a contribution](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=7vmke3tov5d6i1kmo&linkid=2&link=bf0792c83d544e9eb5bf79ad56eaceb7) to our rapidly growing campaign? I personally pledge to you that if you will contribute to this historic challenge to the complacent, "Go along to get along" Republicans, that **I will never stop fighting for you and for our traditional Oklahoma values.** I consider myself a Christian first, a proud American second, a conservative in the mold of Ronald Reagan and Donald Trump third and a Republican forth. _These are not ordinary times, just as I would not ordinarily be a candidate for the US Senate._ We cannot leave the fight ahead to the career politicians who's only goal is re-election and four more years at the public trough. Whether our children live free or under a brutal dictatorship is actually a legitimate question as we look into the future. I am ready to fight and I think you are too. Please rush me your answer today in making your largest possible contribution to my campaign to take back this nation from the traitors and left-wing crackpots who would destroy it. God bless you, **Jackson Lahmeyer**
Candidate for the US Senate PS- If you are not comfortable sending your financial information and credit card data over the internet you can make out a check payable to "Lahmeyer for US Senate" and mail it to 3939 S. Harvard Ave, Ste 140, Tulas, Oklahoma 74135. God Bless You. Paid for by Lahmeyer for U.S. Senate. Jackson Lahmeyer is a 4th generation Oklahoman, devoted father, faithful husband, successful businessman, teacher, and pastor running for the U.S. Senate. Lahmeyer never thought he would run for political office, but after James Lankford betrayed President Trump on January 6, Lahmeyer said he was 'fed up' and decided to enter the race. During Covid's lockdowns and mask mandates, Lahmeyer kept his church open, despite escalating legal threats from Tulsa County - and Lahmeyer won. As a business owner, Lahmeyer took on far-left activists from groups like Black Lives Matter in the face of death threats - and Lahmeyer did not back down. Lahmeyer is a proven leader who does not compromise his Christian principles under political or legal pressure. [www.JacksonLahmeyer.com](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=7vmke3tov5d6i1kmo&linkid=3&link=c4938b4c110f48ffbef7b74dc749ad6c). **Donations to the campaign can be made[ HERE](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=7vmke3tov5d6i1kmo&linkid=4&link=37a68f0ccee94258a2dfa18e43a67a4b)**

name: Tony (personal)
subject: I’m hoping you’ll understand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
|
---

| | [**_I’m sure you’re busy trying to enjoy your Sunday so I won’t keep you too long. I’m asking you to take a moment to read this and understand why I’m running to flip this seat for Democrats. But if you’re in a hurry, please chip in $10 now >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37882553/313045364/1129282168?refcode=20211024_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWM0NzgxZi1mMjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rqLL7yIfrxkgCN4yMC12WRWbqKRNePM7HbxO3nJfNno=) **[The reason I first ran for office was to fight for people like my Dad.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37882554/313045365/1129282168?refcode=20211024_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWM0NzgxZi1mMjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rqLL7yIfrxkgCN4yMC12WRWbqKRNePM7HbxO3nJfNno=)**

My Dad immigrated here with my Mom, to build a better life for me and my older brothers.

He sold hot dogs, drove a taxi, and worked on a factory line to provide for us.

I witnessed his hard work and struggles and knew I had to create change for families like mine.

But when I told him I was running for the State Senate, he didn’t understand.

You see, my Dad grew up in Perú where only the elite held elected office.

But when I was elected to the state Legislature, he was so proud.

Because he saw that everyday people had a chance.

[**He saw there was hope that working folks wouldn’t keep getting left behind. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37882555/313045366/1129282168?refcode=20211024_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWM0NzgxZi1mMjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rqLL7yIfrxkgCN4yMC12WRWbqKRNePM7HbxO3nJfNno=) [**_And he said to me, “Now you’ve gotta do the work” -- and so I did. In the legislature, I fought to secure COVID relief funding and create safer working conditions for factory workers, like my dad. I’ve never stopped fighting for working families and it’s time to take the fight to Congress. But to stand a chance against Don Bacon’s $417,000 warchest, I’m trying to raise $10,000 today. Please chip in $10 to help me get there. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37882556/313045367/1129282168?refcode=20211024_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWM0NzgxZi1mMjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rqLL7yIfrxkgCN4yMC12WRWbqKRNePM7HbxO3nJfNno=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37882557/313045368/1129282168?refcode=20211024_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWM0NzgxZi1mMjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rqLL7yIfrxkgCN4yMC12WRWbqKRNePM7HbxO3nJfNno=)
_The Vargas Family_ Sadly, my Dad passed from COVID-19 in April 2020.

I was horrified when my Republican Congressman voted against critical COVID relief and support for families of COVID victims.

I knew I had to fight for families like mine by unseating him and making it to Congress.

But I don’t come from money -- and winning this race won’t be cheap.

He also taught me that there’s no shame in asking for help when you need it.

[**_So I’m reaching out to my top supporters to ask for your support. If you can relate to my story, even a little, could you chip in $10 now? Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. clean_body: | | | = = My Dad immigrated here with my Mom, to build a better life for me and my older brothers. He sold hot dogs, drove a taxi, and worked on a factory line to provide for us. I witnessed his hard work and struggles and knew I had to create change for families like mine. But when I told him I was running for the State Senate, he didn’t understand. You see, my Dad grew up in Perú where only the elite held elected office. But when I was elected to the state Legislature, he was so proud. Because he saw that everyday people had a chance. = = = The Vargas Family Sadly, my Dad passed from COVID-19 in April 2020. I was horrified when my Republican Congressman voted against critical COVID relief and support for families of COVID victims. I knew I had to fight for families like mine by unseating him and making it to Congress. But I don’t come from money -- and winning this race won’t be cheap. He also taught me that there’s no shame in asking for help when you need it. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for reading, Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund and Latino Victory Fund. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . We don’t want to lose you completely -- but if you want to unsubscribe, you can do so here: ** We can't tell you how much we appreciate your grassroots support! Tony Vargas for Congress PO Box 746 Boys Town, NE 68010 United States info@vargasfornebraska.com | | Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress

name: Jon Sutton, Senior Advisor
subject: Trick or treat! 🎃
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Diego for AG
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37882773/313046847/-1716317403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzFmZGUzNy1mNDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p9gXUloqZzslnQuJO0XlnYh34Na1RVFlTLq2pRutQiA=&emci=91d79563-3e34-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=931fde37-f434-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=10950315)
---
Halloween is just one week away. Soon, it'll be the streets of Arizona that are full of spooky, life-sucking creatures, instead of just the Arizona office of the Attorney General.

Kidding!

But seriously. **For years, the AG's office has been full of Republicans who used it for personal gain and political favors.** From giving breaks to big corporations to blocking life-saving health measures during a pandemic, their behavior has been ghastly.

Diego is going to change that. He's going to be an Attorney General who works FOR the people.

body:
Last cycle, we had numerous black female Republicans run for the House. But there was a reason none of them won, including myself... Last cycle, we had numerous black female Republicans run for the House. But there was a reason none of them won, including myself... | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=aef4be5a5bbc45b29e20d2bb42f5e2f9&_e=_grU7OQC1SVU8Cky1WIqu9xYZ_zTREyL8VOHhqkWjrorH5uB_df0oZiOBhkbaLHd5tNzGq0-MX2d4sqH0Ure_beMwgHCeAAnHVAU9USP3DEJtB-vf9VZoC0FFzqljyLvwzSk2i9vQsPMIHnMp0vawargxiOq8FlxWACw_FZwmQn9wbNysbEA63q6KV3n49Y6MyHsDks0xFh3DIZHLcEgrEz9BV2hv4UEl1sPzbmZffpdRn3105ra8BK05CVMVYsMLptbFkTep-CotzwI6fT5FmRT72QDKOeMHVpfNiq6FLVn903pgRCuAEvVrxVUkkRtOr3ZI2CdmGp_QRXQpQLfrusKgIs50okg8aNANKQlWNdPrhJcqQcMaasitWzQWZaZblUH12-TjakdvnjuxpU3jtsoXbi2HuktP1LwBC69uNGsp8bPxEuTTDbqBl5f4MnP)

Fellow Conservative,

Do you know how many black women currently serve in the House of Representatives? **26 black women and they are ALL Democrats.**

**It’s no wonder leading Democrats, like President Joe Biden feel comfortable saying _“You ain’t black”_ if you vote red** - we haven’t proven to black female Americans that they have a voice in Washington through the Republican Party.

My name is Aja Smith. I am a proud black female American, United States Air Force veteran and [**I’m running for Congress to put Democrats on notice to let them know that there IS a place for African Americans in the party of Lincoln.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=aef4be5a5bbc45b29e20d2bb42f5e2f9&_e=_grU7OQC1SVU8Cky1WIqu9xYZ_zTREyL8VOHhqkWjrorH5uB_df0oZiOBhkbaLHd5tNzGq0-MX2d4sqH0Ure_beMwgHCeAAnHVAU9USP3DEJtB-vf9VZoC0FFzqljyLvwzSk2i9vQsPMIHnMp0vawargxiOq8FlxWACw_FZwmQn9wbNysbEA63q6KV3n49Y6MyHsDks0xFh3DIZHLcEgrEz9BV2hv4UEl1sPzbmZffr9LhFDqbL275k-izp6atHgLuS_2425TiQWFyGbgLTDbKKEFOwTo7PVsXcQ1wtA89lwKfHvJ4R-0b9tZMO0LDhcyoZ1VLWVRs_YnhJI52-ZFRU8vHaSm3GtWQBxTaM541vl2z2sS6fkkKifwazQBtqFpPV0Oi6GSivPLp5j0Ma_Jgbz7xLPnBUgL6ZQOd_N1oHjPcrh5P328WJ1zF8vl7y2) We are NOT an anomaly.

We can change the Democrats’ narrative, break their chains in the black community and take back the House in 2022, [**but not without your immediate financial support.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=aef4be5a5bbc45b29e20d2bb42f5e2f9&_e=_grU7OQC1SVU8Cky1WIqu9xYZ_zTREyL8VOHhqkWjrorH5uB_df0oZiOBhkbaLHd5tNzGq0-MX2d4sqH0Ure_beMwgHCeAAnHVAU9USP3DEJtB-vf9VZoC0FFzqljyLvwzSk2i9vQsPMIHnMp0vawargxiOq8FlxWACw_FZwmQn9wbNysbEA63q6KV3n49Y6MyHsDks0xFh3DIZHLcEgrEz9BV2hv4UEl1sPzbmZffo5U0CdCkIRhBBOWOUlPwE0hgFnRv7S1H8opF_A6B2wXWPFL-PX_jGab67R5CoQM38zK4P7DgZDYKoTk1fg5dpshfkK_U5D_ZSA2sNgtD05dTBYXb2B89QPIJee2msiyg4_0SZR8MoIajGdRFLlgFyihBluWwOVhlp22oUBmB8v1Bbwf2keeApuRIkDksTImLd4ztHimw-8nxBT3lS-Hbpm)

[**Send A Black Conservative
Female to Congress ✈ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=aef4be5a5bbc45b29e20d2bb42f5e2f9&_e=_grU7OQC1SVU8Cky1WIqu9xYZ_zTREyL8VOHhqkWjrorH5uB_df0oZiOBhkbaLHd5tNzGq0-MX2d4sqH0Ure_beMwgHCeAAnHVAU9USP3DEJtB-vf9VZoC0FFzqljyLvwzSk2i9vQsPMIHnMp0vawargxiOq8FlxWACw_FZwmQn9wbNysbEA63q6KV3n49Y6MyHsDks0xFh3DIZHLcEgrEz9BV2hv4UEl1sPzbmZffosSqs_g4TP-89N1fkT-dSy0lido9rrvyrB-U_5KGEi4qSbe58Nrl9QgvoLG2KgbyPUvXeewbukLIOU4PVl_LlLX1RaLaPlauXT6OccI3R7wtrqwjkAnmIqaAIACgqWAtvF9U6GpHsfPIh2h-oUSfzTY5Y8xErqEmj8XXyam3AM7G0bbyXRORZVRHXdDOXtR7AF2xGoVR7QIhPAH9knSj1b)
If I win my targeted House race, I can show every American, including Democrats, that ethnicity should not dictate your political party and black females are allowed to step out of line and think for themselves.

Last cycle, we had numerous black female Republicans run for the House. But there was a reason none of them won, including myself... We didn’t have the resources to take on the Democrat Machine that dedicated countless resources to silence and defeat us.

That's why although the Midterm Election seems far away, [**I need every proud patriot to support my campaign immediately, so that when the Democrats come after me for being a black Republican female, which they will, I will be prepared to take them on and win.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=aef4be5a5bbc45b29e20d2bb42f5e2f9&_e=_grU7OQC1SVU8Cky1WIqu9xYZ_zTREyL8VOHhqkWjrorH5uB_df0oZiOBhkbaLHd5tNzGq0-MX2d4sqH0Ure_beMwgHCeAAnHVAU9USP3DEJtB-vf9VZoC0FFzqljyLvwzSk2i9vQsPMIHnMp0vawargxiOq8FlxWACw_FZwmQn9wbNysbEA63q6KV3n49Y6MyHsDks0xFh3DIZHLcEgrEz9BV2hv4UEl1sPzbmZffooKCLz54LkJbpZpWeSpM3W40JhW5OARlOwUptsakApIwQBF-EPFBtGJSRpZfnQdqAoMyeJDKNK8g4XaLX9Y55T9QuTEmkP3U35jAK-ltTcblcXMXo0pHlHz8uZs9EPgqGWrpjbFW5tqIu55zaiwSDSl4EQzj_IMxQqk8J-y4RjsxuWfoaK0M9mj48xbm2mSq-DU4PlXM3KsKJCOl5Z33nX)

[**Send A Black Conservative
Female to Congress ✈ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=aef4be5a5bbc45b29e20d2bb42f5e2f9&_e=_grU7OQC1SVU8Cky1WIqu9xYZ_zTREyL8VOHhqkWjrorH5uB_df0oZiOBhkbaLHd5tNzGq0-MX2d4sqH0Ure_beMwgHCeAAnHVAU9USP3DEJtB-vf9VZoC0FFzqljyLvwzSk2i9vQsPMIHnMp0vawargxiOq8FlxWACw_FZwmQn9wbNysbEA63q6KV3n49Y6MyHsDks0xFh3DIZHLcEgrEz9BV2hv4UEl1sPzbmZffrY_R6496Ul_7tsz6Izpcp-j5VgxAkeOEIC6XBjROyeFt6fmHjfSINadaLdSa65ow7T_MuqAsWNWxqQSN34U7WRHhRwl9zHFuXI9Ya0vA18zqyv5Cna2YJI6VFONFgaRv8oJd90ZS2NJzDpyRRgSDZUxsonhepYQbZyi8O1TZ19rmiNClYGsO0DdFgpXxUdtryyZgeBRoTifNS02Cfld2na)
Fellow Conservative, you need to understand how important my candidacy truly is for the Republican Party. It’s not only about taking back the House, but also about making history in America.

clean_body: Last cycle, we had numerous black female Republicans run for the House. But there was a reason none of them won, including myself... Last cycle, we had numerous black female Republicans run for the House. But there was a reason none of them won, including myself... | Fellow Conservative, Do you know how many black women currently serve in the House of Representatives? 26 black women and they are ALL Democrats. It’s no wonder leading Democrats, like President Joe Biden feel comfortable saying “You ain’t black” if you vote red - we haven’t proven to black female Americans that they have a voice in Washington through the Republican Party. My name is Aja Smith. I am a proud black female American, United States Air Force veteran and We are NOT an anomaly. We can change the Democrats’ narrative, break their chains in the black community and take back the House in 2022, If I win my targeted House race, I can show every American, including Democrats, that ethnicity should not dictate your political party and black females are allowed to step out of line and think for themselves. Last cycle, we had numerous black female Republicans run for the House. But there was a reason none of them won, including myself... We didn’t have the resources to take on the Democrat Machine that dedicated countless resources to silence and defeat us. That's why although the Midterm Election seems far away, Fellow Conservative, you need to understand how important my candidacy truly is for the Republican Party. It’s not only about taking back the House, but also about making history in America. With your help, I can become the FIRST black female Republican elected to the House from California. We can change the course of history through THIS race! So, Fellow Conservative, what do you say? Are you going to stand with me and be a part of one of the most important races in the Midterm Election? Thank you, Aja Smith United States Air Force Veteran Republican for Congress | Aja is a United States Air Force veteran. She was deployed to Qatar in 2007, where she proudly participated in Operation Enduring Freedom. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Aja Smith is a retired member of the United States Air Force. If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach our goals and raise what we need _right now_.

The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and _The New York Times_ reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement.

I won't let them – but I need your help. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals.

**So I'll be direct, Derek: I'm asking you to split a donation – here and now – between my campaign and Common Good VA. This will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle, and we simply can't afford to fall behind before we even get started.**

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Reminder: Aadland for U.S. Senate News
body:
Erik on Healthcare & Taxation solutions for America
---
| | | | | | Volume 13 | October 20, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
America is dangerously divided. Furthermore, we know that a house divided against itself cannot stand. The list of issues seems endless, and none of them are truly partisan. I will bring solutions to Washington--ideas that solve problems for you, your family, your friends, and your neighbors.

For example, consider the cost of health care. I am deeply concerned that too many people do not have access to quality, affordable health care. I will strive to make access to affordable healthcare possible without further burdening taxpayers.

The current system is clearly broken. Americans pay nearly twice as much as in any other country, and we are far from the healthiest in the world. Some advocate for Medicare for all, but this would simply lead to a rationing of care. Who decides what care will be provided or the cost? Do we trust a Washington bureaucrat to decide who receives treatment?
So, what are the solutions? What parameters must be met? This is a systemic problem, and the current insurance system is rife with grift and abuse. Unfortunately, Democrats just want to throw money at the problem, or reduce quality health care into socialized medicine. Enlarging the bureaucracy is not the answer.
First of all, health care must be patient-centered; the system must serve each individual's health, not corporate profits or Washington power. The patient must be central to the type of care and the costs.
Next, there should be cost transparency in plans that use market-based solutions. With transparency of costs, patients and their physicians are who determine what drugs or therapies are best suited to the individual circumstances. The NIH and FDC could be employed to greatly assist physicians by providing studies that compare generic drugs with newer brand-named drugs and newer medical therapies with those that are more established.
Health Savings Accounts should be maximized, remain untaxed and any excess at the end of the year should be applied to retirement funds. Let's incentive good health practices. As market forces are exercised, the patient is put in charge of their care and the costs.
Healthcare should be cheap and affordable; unfortunately, anything managed by DC is neither. Thus, healthcare should be localized as much as possible.
There are free market solutions to providing health care to all. We know the Affordable Care Act is not affordable. By increasing competitive choice within the health care field, price stability, service, quality, and accessibility all increase.
|
---
| | |
---
| | | [Visit Aadland for U.S. Senate website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MHCXBIgjFE1bmEuRXxQc5Q27r7qz9MZnq9K7PPLMBQ0qpe-ECq4hFUbDD0REvUvj1zftySISEK3YQmwgoLO1jtpkvyDq3OGdiLJ_YVHm0iuGdWtLDj2fjlJqys7wGKntMxQCH7mTwVkxXSqackfptxauq6mzs43H&c=Ugh4rXqS08wg1fYDmAvLRGQehPfHM7wUjCVb2nHmYbImdhnmceSNkw==&ch=BDpH02PgJVUf1X3fS5yjZzDFUMNzNEr6sX1r02JOjy_iyXX94a3j6A==)
---

| Upcoming Events
---
| |
---|---
|
* Thursday October 21st: El Paso Club meeting. 30 East Platt Avenue in Colorado Springs. Begins at 5:30

* Saturday, October 23rd: Erik will speak at the Arapahoe Lincoln Day Dinner - 6:30 PM in Aurora, CO

* Tuesday, October 26th: Erik will speak to Fremont County Republicans at 6:30 PM in Canon City

* Wednesday, October 27th: Erik will speak at the Monthly Conservative "Meet Up" at 6:30 PM in Greenwood Village

| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
It's been a busy week. Erik spoke to the Park County Republican Central Committee Meeting on the 13th. The event included a formal speech and an enthusiastic Q&A session after.

Randy Corporon's Wake Up! show hosted Erik on Saturday the 16th. A lively discussion ensued on the upcoming election and the growing candidate field.

Erik conducted multiple Coffee and Zoom meetings with constituents to discuss their concerns and thoughts. In addition to these meetings, he met with multiple private citizens to discuss Colorado issues and the state of The Union.

We hope to see you somewhere on the campaign trail!
| |
---
| | [Listen to Erik's radio appearances](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MHCXBIgjFE1bmEuRXxQc5Q27r7qz9MZnq9K7PPLMBQ0qpe-ECq4hFS_HyBBPCpEQeYqs_TSy8btdsXemsJ7vdsJ1TeVLkglLEwGzSHf4DCJfeiOSfavuCyJLAeIw6kpbIN0zEfPMc2t5FGKDnf4w-Pv6cWDCl2_gTW17ByDuCWk=&c=Ugh4rXqS08wg1fYDmAvLRGQehPfHM7wUjCVb2nHmYbImdhnmceSNkw==&ch=BDpH02PgJVUf1X3fS5yjZzDFUMNzNEr6sX1r02JOjy_iyXX94a3j6A==)
---
| | |
---
| Can you help?
---
| The fact is, money is crucial to reaching people with the news of Erik Aadland. Since this is a state-wide campaign, our task is to reach every single voter in Colorado. Costs to reach these folks range from printed materials to travel to advertising and much more. Aadland for U.S. Senate is a true grass-roots campaign. We don't have the advantage of a ten-figure personal fortune to get going like other campaigns which Colorado has had to endure. We count on every-day folks like you to to help with any amount they can. Please consider helping Erik secure the Republican nomination by making a donation today.
Help us save the country! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for U.S. Senate Staff
---

|

name: Team Padilla
subject: Right to the point
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
we are going to have to build the largest grassroots movement California has ever seen
#

Happy Sunday!
We know it’s the weekend, so we’ll get right to the point:
[**Can you make a contribution - of ANY amount you can afford - to Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate before the weekend comes to a close?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211024-1-15&t=1&refcode2=413_159979_IjSkIG&akid=413%2E159979%2EIjSkIG)
Look, in order to make sure we win this race and keep Alex’s voice and vote in the Senate, we are going to have to build the largest grassroots movement California has ever seen.
Because the same far-right Trump supporters behind the recall are going to be coming for Alex’s seat.
They’d love nothing more than to replace California’s first Latino Senator with a far-right, anti-science, anti-immigrant Republican who would hand control of the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell.
So we aren’t taking anything for granted. We aren’t waiting until closer to Election Day to start organizing. But the kind of in-depth, on-the-ground organizing that is going to win this race is not easy. _It’s going to take money and resources over a sustained period of time._
**That’s why your contribution right now in October 2021 makes such a big difference, and it’s why we have to ask:**
[**Can you please make a contribution to keep Alex Padilla in the Senate? Your donation of ANY amount sends a powerful statement to California Republicans that we are going to fight to hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211024-1-15&t=2&refcode2=413_159979_IjSkIG&akid=413%2E159979%2EIjSkIG)
Thank you and enjoy the rest of your weekend!
\- Team Padilla
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211024-1-15&t=3&refcode2=413_159979_IjSkIG&akid=413%2E159979%2EIjSkIG)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=413%2E159979%2EIjSkIG)

That’s why your contribution right now in October 2021 makes such a big difference, and it’s why we have to ask: Thank you and enjoy the rest of your weekend! \- Team Padilla Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: FWD: New report shows how Trump nearly destroyed the Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend - in the wake of the latest revelations about Donald Trump, I had to make sure you didn't miss my earlier message (below). The Senate Judiciary Committee's new report spells out Trump's actions as clear as day: He tried to overturn a free and fair election by weaponizing the Department of Justice. When the Justice Department didn't budge, he held a dangerous rally that incited insurrection and violence on our Capitol. Each day that passes - with every investigative hearing held in the House and Senate - we learn more chilling information about the lengths Donald Trump, his family, and his allies went to thwart democracy and keep themselves in power. But we are only just getting to the bottom of the full truth, and Trump's GOP allies in Congress will do whatever it takes to obstruct our investigations. **We cannot allow the Republican Party to brush Trump 's severe wrongdoings under the rug. That's why I need grassroots Democrats like you to speak up by the thousands. So if you haven't let me know where you stand, please add your voice right now:** **[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump, his family, and members of Congress if it's proved that they aided the Jan. 6 insurrectionists? Click here to add your name if you agree.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-crimes?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1084-su-nd)** Thank you, Dick
