\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Fri, Oct 15, 2021
Subject: New report shows how Trump nearly destroyed the Constitution

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=BuZRuv7oLIYU%2FW9a9sowSsf6%2Fu%2BzQhuQ&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
I have serious news from the Senate Judiciary Committee: We just released our interim report about former president Donald Trump's attempts to overturn the 2020 election.
Our report reveals how Trump nearly destroyed the Constitution in his attempt to abuse the Department of Justice to overturn the election. The details are truly horrifying.
In a Jan. 3 Oval Office meeting between Trump, former Attorney General Jeffrey Rosen, and other Department of Justice and White House officials, the former president repeatedly pressured his attorney general to resign so he could install a Trump loyalist who would pursue Trump's false claims of voter fraud.
There's no other way to call it: On Jan. 3, Donald Trump tried to weaponize the Department of Justice to overturn a free and fair election. Three days later, he held a "Stop the Steal" rally that incited a violent and deadly insurrection on the Capitol.
Friend, these truths are appalling, but they are only the tip of the iceberg - and as a former U.S. attorney and state attorney general, I can tell you that there is very real potential for consideration of criminal charges against Donald Trump. We must continue gathering all the facts about everyone involved, from Donald Trump to his family, to officials in his administration.
**By contrast, nearly the entire Republican Party is consolidated around protecting themselves and covering up any wrongdoing and illegal actions by Donald Trump.** In spite of evidence to the contrary, my Republican colleagues on the Judiciary Committee have chosen to conclude that Trump _did not_ use the justice system to overturn the election.**That is why I 'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to speak out by the thousands.**
**In light of these new revelations, even if you 've spoken up before, I am urgently asking you to keep holding Donald Trump accountable. We cannot back down now. So please, let me know where you stand:**
**[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump, his family, and members of Congress if it's proved that they aided the Jan. 6 insurrectionists? Click here to add your name if you agree.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-crimes?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1084-su-nd)**
The truth is becoming clearer and clearer - and all signs point to the most dangerous, anti-democratic behavior of Donald Trump. It's up to us to hold him accountable. Thank you for continuing to speak out.
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1084-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=rLbkFJ2NacOafXHq1e39jsf6%2Fu%2BzQhuQ&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: the only thing scarier than me in a costume
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If Congress is a haunted house — that must make us ghostbusters.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211024-3192-header&t=1&akid=3192%2E434096%2EE5trjZ)
Ya know what’s scarier than me dressing up as Lurch Adams? The GOP keeping this Senate seat red in 2022.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33867?refcode=em20211024-3192&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3192%2E434096%2EE5trjZ)
If Congress is a Haunted House — does that mean that we can be ghostbusters this Halloween? 🎃👻
It’s what my kids are calling "spooky season" — and there are a couple of things we’re looking out for. This week, Gisele + I hope you’re able to get outside and spend some time with family and loved ones. Maybe even trick or treat!
[**But before you do, will you please donate $5 right now to help us staff up, take our message all across PA, and win this race? I promise I’ll wear my normal outfit (aka shorts) soon.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33867?refcode=em20211024-3192&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3192%2E434096%2EE5trjZ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33867?refcode=em20211024-3192&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3192%2E434096%2EE5trjZ)**
Our campaign has the best shot to flip Pennsylvania blue, but we need your help to do it.
Like so many of you — I’m haunted by how quickly this year is going by. By Halloween next year, the race for Pennsylvania’s Senate seat will be in its FINAL moments. **When you’re the #1 Most Likely to Flip state in the country, just imagining the chaos can scare the pants off of anyone — myself included. 😱**
That’s why you keep getting my emails, receiving my texts, and seeing my ads. Because there’s absolutely *no telling* what scare the GOP will have in store for the Democratic nominee in the coming months.
The smart strategy is to be prepared for ANYTHING. [**That means investing early in campaign infrastructure, organizing, polling, and ads — anything that can give us the competitive edge we need to secure this seat for the Dems + lock in our majority in the Senate. Will you help us make these crucial early investments with your first $5 donation?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33867?refcode=em20211024-3192&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3192%2E434096%2EE5trjZ)
I know we can do this with your help, Peter. Now, let’s go trick or treating.
Happy Haunting! 🎃
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211024-3192-footer&t=24&refcode2=3192_434096_E5trjZ&akid=3192%2E434096%2EE5trjZ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=3192%2E434096%2EE5trjZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3192%2E434096%2EE5trjZ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Josh Harder
subject: Why this is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/euqsRDCuqep-naaZnXRQJUn2-gm3Npwyc1lseWb3aYE=/y9cJBI8oW9pwSL-xcfa8ZaZZeSixm89VEI50QbAkjfI=) | Hi Peter, My brother's story is the reason I decided to run for public office. David was born 10 weeks premature, and underwent $2 million worth of surgeries to help him survive. There's no way my parents could have afforded that without insurance. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/euqsRDCuqep-naaZnXRQJUn2-gm3Npwyc1lseWb3aYE=/y9cJBI8oW9pwSL-xcfa8ZaZZeSixm89VEI50QbAkjfI=) I know this issue isn't unique to my family. Millions of families have to make the impossible choice between putting food on the table and paying for life-saving medications or operations. Healthcare costs have spiraled out of control, and it's unacceptable to me that in the world's richest country we still can't treat healthcare as a human right. That's why I'm so adamant that we allow Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug prices. **[If you stand with me, Peter, please take a moment to sign onto my petition today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/euqsRDCuqep-naaZnXRQJUn2-gm3Npwyc1lseWb3aYE=/y9cJBI8oW9pwSL-xcfa8ZaZZeSixm89VEI50QbAkjfI=)** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO LOWER DRUG PRICES](https://act.myngp.com/el/euqsRDCuqep-naaZnXRQJUn2-gm3Npwyc1lseWb3aYE=/y9cJBI8oW9pwSL-xcfa8ZaZZeSixm89VEI50QbAkjfI=)
---
Together, I know that we can create a more affordable and equitable healthcare system.
Thank you,
Josh
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/euqsRDCuqep-naaZnXRQJUn2-gm3Npwyc1lseWb3aYE=/g_TZfFCWi4VmbRyjrcF8RxNlGBAto5LaZZxgF0bOAlk=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/euqsRDCuqep-naaZnXRQJUn2-gm3Npwyc1lseWb3aYE=/sVcPcLYPElFBggOiJEsgJvxq21t0tdXPli1cL3itwks=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/euqsRDCuqep-naaZnXRQJUn2-gm3Npwyc1lseWb3aYE=/3_VSUEKfatvQm36rFTzZ6xviLRseWZma3x95Oej4JuQ=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/euqsRDCuqep-naaZnXRQJUn2-gm3Npwyc1lseWb3aYE=/MVCy6IK017_Vxo0xgnSXP9NGE1JJ48fO9WRe4ZXhnfA=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/euqsRDCuqep-naaZnXRQJUn2-gm3Npwyc1lseWb3aYE=/e9yhX7WrwVnzqLJ820F6bure4vYg8LyF7wbz8XfuN74=?refcode=E11979-20211024-BrothersStory-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/euqsRDCuqep-naaZnXRQJUn2-gm3Npwyc1lseWb3aYE=/e9yhX7WrwVnzqLJ820F6bure4vYg8LyF7wbz8XfuN74=?refcode=E11979-20211024-BrothersStory-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/euqsRDCuqep-naaZnXRQJUn2-gm3Npwyc1lseWb3aYE=/e9yhX7WrwVnzqLJ820F6bure4vYg8LyF7wbz8XfuN74=?refcode=E11979-20211024-BrothersStory-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)**

name: Dr. Mary L Trump
subject: I’m stunned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
I thought more people would be worried.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37884720/313056351/-2023814932?refcode=20211024.6_MT_10GV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQ0OWZjYS0wMDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9V5o8Mc0M13oArByIHdsHTXBHrfOmpKhJ9F3qP-SDWc=)

| | I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the presidency again.

I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again.

_**It seems I was wrong.**_

Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is.

Turnout is low, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. We need more resources, so he can mobilize the voters he needs to win.

_**[Will you pitch in right now to help Terry mobilize Virginia voters over the last couple days of this election? Your donation will be matched today only.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37884721/313056352/-2023814932?refcode=20211024.6_MT_10GV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQ0OWZjYS0wMDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9V5o8Mc0M13oArByIHdsHTXBHrfOmpKhJ9F3qP-SDWc=)**_ | | | **[$15 = $30](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37884722/313056353/-2023814932?refcode=20211024.6_MT_10GV&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQ0OWZjYS0wMDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9V5o8Mc0M13oArByIHdsHTXBHrfOmpKhJ9F3qP-SDWc=)**

clean_body: I thought more people would be worried. | | | = | | I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the presidency again. I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again. It seems I was wrong. Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is. Turnout is low, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. We need more resources, so he can mobilize the voters he needs to win. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up. Are you going to stand by and hand my uncle a victory? Or will you fight back and help Terry keep Virginia blue? I am counting on you to make sure my uncle can’t claim victory by seeing his hand-picked candidate win in Virginia on Tuesday, November 2. Mary L. Trump, PhD =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Endorsement Recap!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Since I announced my campaign to run for Congress in Texas' 38th Congressional district, I have been traveling across Houston listening to voters, volunteers, grassroots leaders, and elected officials who have major concerns about the dysfunction happening in Washington D.C. I assured them that as their representative, I will spend every day working to save our country from the left’s radical agenda.

The issues that frequently enter the conversation center around Joe Biden's disastrous presidency. Oil and gas companies are suffering terribly at the hands of Democrats who want to implement the Green New Deal at the expense of Texas and Houston jobs. At this moment, Democrats are trying to hide their Green New Deal agenda in Biden’s multi-trillion dollar spending package.

Houstonians also deeply care about the catastrophe at our southern border and the 1.7 million illegal immigrants that have entered our country with zero documentation. As if these problems were not enough, now hyperinflation and a broken supply chain threaten our economy and our community. We need representatives in Washington that understand these problems and will address them head on.

Our campaign has received incredible support from numerous national leaders in the conservative movement as well as the hardworking conservative leaders at the grassroots level. In as little as 28 days, I have received endorsements from Senator Ted Cruz, Secretary Mike Pompeo, Secretary James Baker, Senator Tom Cotton, Mayors Jim Pappas, Marcus Vajdos, and strong conservative women like Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, Carolyn Hodges, Jan Ott, and many more key national and local figures.

These leaders understand that the window to save America is closing.

If elected to Congress, I promise to fight against the Democrats’ progressive agenda, to secure our elections and our southern border, to keep critical race theory out of our classrooms, and present a conservative agenda that protects the values that made America exceptional in the first place. Make no mistake, this is the most important election in our lifetime, and with your support, we can take back the House in 2022 and stop the radical agenda that is destroying our country.

Sincerely,
Wesley

****[JOIN THE TEAM](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=b52bc7ad9de4473c8e32596d955ccc9a&_e=zgyjny6A43H7_KYr70IpQmskgF9AaH5VEKbCamFwJuP6WNZlfA485LUUZq4BnxPp0iZJ5MUqz2IfrU1-SqxKU6ydL2LXv7yuSAMcDpinrO27y2tmHAhcdY5QGn6bl332rqfNUSLW9ViQPyTjnqR2JcMeioZjbgjj7YrvBaYazVS5Ta04pie1vB6Qg-zvm7RKrOA8RZWDLeVKTvsGR4K7fBX-qC7fwZ_uqaWbWNNJNf5OziH759MycqO9nIuH5BSZElJHyVK0n3tlZwPLfs1B8lrRIVEY10irL33srviTMV8%3D)****
---

name: Quaye Quartey
subject: FWD: Team, 30 seconds? // one-click poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Quartey for Congress
body:
Hey team, I’m just bumping the one-click poll HQ sent out yesterday. Look, everyday issues that impact our communities shouldn’t be treated like partisan football. Whether it's making health care more affordable or ensuring our children’s schools receive the aid they need -- it affects all of us. **Please take a moment to complete our one-click poll below and tell me which issue means the most to you.** I vow to fight for what's right in Congress, but I need to know what is important to you. \-- Quaye \---------- Forwarded message ---------

name: Mike Johnson
subject: What is the Attorney General hiding?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
This Justice Department thinks concerned parents are “domestic terrorists.” | [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=371ec4d09ff94fa9a0529602950a4dca&_e=AGoiUou9y8E0J9hU1e9dRsSkcmaxeBB_LW8ltGPWOMHh-jY0ir24P1CG2LpSgxYmKQgdgW8IUeGRQsmY0eg2MNFjRlF4JruSALpIf_U1GWIvHMpAtJ1GGmdjxyyDPXXUgOyLTmTpNEZTv27wbxpy3RK-mSSHkuU-v7OM79pju60i4X8MzMsRCczASr0sOHqEQRaOEB1VdHPnymy9jEWiMqBSKohpkZfowESxDpMXnrYh4jc_Zz8HmYGEY4g9-IwJoyhNYjGl600FQW78F7LPMLaHxzCMel0qOzkPeNjYb5f8OKs_DsUPAOKCWdOzWkrG5G7usGo9KOur1Vi0SPOaxsTvDmcWKqZmcpBR-FXoPPQp1zJUN2CGYTdu29z8JxLU)

---
Fellow American,

You have to see this.

During our nationally televised House Judiciary Committee hearing today, Attorney General Merrick Garland repeatedly refused to answer my question of whether or not he would submit to an ethics review that everyone knows is clearly necessary.

His controversial memo directing the FBI to target parents exercising their First Amendment rights at local school board meetings has raised many critical questions - not the least of which is the curious financial interests that his family has in the matter.

Garland’s son-in-law co-founded an education company that peddles Critical Race Theory and “anti-racist” curricula - the exact cirrucula that parents across the country are protesting at their local school boards.

[ **WATCH ME GRILL ATTORNEY GENERAL GARLAND** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=371ec4d09ff94fa9a0529602950a4dca&_e=AGoiUou9y8E0J9hU1e9dRsSkcmaxeBB_LW8ltGPWOMHh-jY0ir24P1CG2LpSgxYmKQgdgW8IUeGRQsmY0eg2MNFjRlF4JruSALpIf_U1GWIvHMpAtJ1GGmdjxyyDPXXUgOyLTmTpNEZTv27wbxpy3RK-mSSHkuU-v7OM79pju63zY4CtcNo4E__mbTp3we40P_baVy1T_Y9zjkHKebd5JOQqQ4OjeUPguytdHVjQFy-zL0hFtGqSHD151wZ5-bdd8xVQPa0ljLtYOFeG1CfeQCYFu9OtyMtALlMUc84GaHph1QW1yaFYrA1ur8rOj-FQ_wCiquWZEPcQ9-2ur8HsRwDWeWWwwJ7wtaWkpMmN16P0XGHOMWGna61d0DrEM8kT)

[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=371ec4d09ff94fa9a0529602950a4dca&_e=AGoiUou9y8E0J9hU1e9dRsSkcmaxeBB_LW8ltGPWOMHh-jY0ir24P1CG2LpSgxYmKQgdgW8IUeGRQsmY0eg2MNFjRlF4JruSALpIf_U1GWIvHMpAtJ1GGmdjxyyDPXXUgOyLTmTpNEZTv27wbxpy3RK-mSSHkuU-v7OM79pju605b9E_OvgREu7IqOsvEDeXngVWf_IkWgvPQxxdElqj6J6NAw54L6eNOV3v5wvagzNSdOewAJ7Be3TlaTypS7bR5sHqJ_a-sz-PHF1uO5xhj443HePky1BcuEp4rozewM31B6g4LzuGLpJqNKnih7B4j0MWC0rfuoZgyoDPyHPoXzH-R6AzusPkXaftBrQr2cRXTx0AHPbGJVNH2zdotZ9b)

Fellow American, the American people are rapidly losing faith in our institutions, starting with the Department of Justice. If the top law enforcement official in the country won’t submit to a simple ethics review, how can people expect fair treatment under the law?

[**Remember, we do not have a two-tiered justice system. In America, no one is above the law, which is why I believe it’s so important to demand transparency from top government officials.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=371ec4d09ff94fa9a0529602950a4dca&_e=AGoiUou9y8E0J9hU1e9dRsSkcmaxeBB_LW8ltGPWOMHh-jY0ir24P1CG2LpSgxYmKQgdgW8IUeGRQsmY0eg2MNFjRlF4JruSALpIf_U1GWIvHMpAtJ1GGmdjxyyDPXXUgOyLTmTpNEZTv27wbxpy3RK-mSSHkuU-v7OM79pju61VisXOoTgMJuI7NMHkZ7FHIWJA2w_kXyH7P1W4_sILaUsJPrzSjEDnKxPoVltQyzGkLln4U9UAYBPVuaMtAB2YLQEbw0ihdo2njvbUH7BpefwN9vWDSylvtVNBR-QhMxRKUVQHD_jXJViRpItvxbYQi267ZgysfWjsbUms3tI7Ucj0Vgu41kzvWDkqdWz3g24XIQRTRFTg055_qSSbI5yG)

[ **STAND FOR TRANSPARENCY: CHIP IN NOW** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=371ec4d09ff94fa9a0529602950a4dca&_e=AGoiUou9y8E0J9hU1e9dRsSkcmaxeBB_LW8ltGPWOMHh-jY0ir24P1CG2LpSgxYmKQgdgW8IUeGRQsmY0eg2MNFjRlF4JruSALpIf_U1GWIvHMpAtJ1GGmdjxyyDPXXUgOyLTmTpNEZTv27wbxpy3RK-mSSHkuU-v7OM79pju60PbGhsV-TapFLQsednbOT7MKpS1DlDWj94q7Vm5L7kE_p1l9vgNDiMtH04PkV0Rpn2ByV3IQLXqmwK7lBCdyXq63-sVwe4xcRX4n45bHrlcoxdVsl03R7dzTxHM0Y2w41kWUJXzg9sOQrYumBymg_3TnKTzSdwIuJj2QcjkLxUc3BsLw-7hay0VfsVmZvicfc7f03BMrqQAU3tcp0swShT)
Hearings like we held today are essential to a functioning republic, and with Democrats obstructing at every turn, it’s imperative that we regain the majority in 2022.

[**Will you stand with me and concerned parents across the country and send a message to Democrats that we simply won’t stand for this?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=371ec4d09ff94fa9a0529602950a4dca&_e=AGoiUou9y8E0J9hU1e9dRsSkcmaxeBB_LW8ltGPWOMHh-jY0ir24P1CG2LpSgxYmKQgdgW8IUeGRQsmY0eg2MNFjRlF4JruSALpIf_U1GWIvHMpAtJ1GGmdjxyyDPXXUgOyLTmTpNEZTv27wbxpy3RK-mSSHkuU-v7OM79pju61697qODco6xNl7BQlvhxqHnSHtTH5TpwYrzml-NMzLCzyWRJnC3LDB4xc1Xca7KzrrJ358Zdj0zP4AImbxE8m1KVQsw9HiGBJTHaYWvF7qiweGKrPwjtDQ3YAvKM3TVg1cw1hL6B1o48BvmG7ocE-IsNrhfU7eF8d2Bu2Y3sL5ZKPw2I2taRBKA1dMw8rwK2ig6t26rhfR3IAPwh83SFDE)

[ **CHIP IN NOW** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=371ec4d09ff94fa9a0529602950a4dca&_e=AGoiUou9y8E0J9hU1e9dRsSkcmaxeBB_LW8ltGPWOMHh-jY0ir24P1CG2LpSgxYmKQgdgW8IUeGRQsmY0eg2MNFjRlF4JruSALpIf_U1GWIvHMpAtJ1GGmdjxyyDPXXUgOyLTmTpNEZTv27wbxpy3RK-mSSHkuU-v7OM79pju62FOF659GaLvJoG_ZnJ7Kp_U0fZ0h7AY037MFfyilqYATeRJctcGZ9pphEuiu7vSFTVU1nB8TD1EVsMsgMCReo9Aqp-7pizmZLFhNyk6XC8nH8KedOGiZmOqz-YXFlKPn_VIUUoo7Vs9Pe63Y0qlt1qif-ZYTzhvMd7huLWrTbkPyedDmOOIPOyD5me0Rchm9bQFkJxXQWB5-DDCvalYdXt)

Mike Johnson

| Dear Patriot, I have big news today -- Fauci is in serious trouble. The National Institute of Health just admitted that Fauci funded gain-of-function research at the Wuhan lab. Now it's all spiraling downhill for Anthony Fauci. When I called him out for funding gain-of-function research in Wuhan, I was called a lunatic conspiracy theorist by the mainstream media. Now I'm vindicated. And Fauci has been proven to be a serial liar. Here's the question now: will Joe Biden's Department of Justice investigate him for lying under oath in front of the U.S. Senate? Today, I am renewing my push for a criminal investigation of Anthony Fauci. Actions must have consequences. If you or I lied under oath, in any circumstance, we would be immediately hit with perjury charges. Why do well-connected government officials like James Clapper or Anthony Fauci get away with lying to Congress? It is now a matter of public record that Fauci's statements under oath were lies. And I refuse to let him off the hook! I'm proud of the work that I've done exposing Fauci and holding him accountable. And I promise you this is only the beginning. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37886153/313066329/-2023814932?refcode=20211024.7_SA_10GW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWNjZDE1YS0wZDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oU3eRoZZaYAQ7yCNWQ4PhETAse28AgMNCU3ymGZEOU0=) Derek, we have 9 days left in the most important election of 2021, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.

**We know who Terry McAuliffe is, Derek. For four years, Terry showed you who he would be as the Governor of Virginia.**

He fought for Virginians every single day.

He stood up to hate and division.

And he put words into action by restoring the right to vote to more than 173,000 people.

We know Terry McAuliffe, Derek — and we know that he’s the leader Virginia needs right now.

_**[I’m asking you to join me in the final days of Terry’s campaign by chipping in any amount right now. Every single dollar you contribute will go directly toward Terry’s efforts to turn out voters in this must-win race, and your donation will be matched if you chip in before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37886154/313066330/-2023814932?refcode=20211024.7_SA_10GW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWNjZDE1YS0wZDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oU3eRoZZaYAQ7yCNWQ4PhETAse28AgMNCU3ymGZEOU0=)**_

Look, this race isn’t just about a name on the ballot. It’s not just about Terry McAuliffe versus Glenn Youngkin.

It’s about the people they’re pledging to serve as governor.

Terry McAuliffe has shown us that he will lift up all Virginians and fight for this Commonwealth.

Glenn Youngkin has shown us that he will stand with Donald Trump, extremists, and insurrectionists.

**Right now, we need to fulfill our promise as citizens to _stand up_ for each other, and _fight_ for each other, and _vote_ with each other to change the future for everyone.**

And Derek, that starts with electing Terry McAuliffe as Governor of Virginia.

_**[Please, chip in any amount to Terry’s campaign right now to power his campaign through the finish line. clean_body: | | | = | | = Derek, we have 9 days left in the most important election of 2021, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. We know who Terry McAuliffe is, Derek. For four years, Terry showed you who he would be as the Governor of Virginia. He fought for Virginians every single day. He stood up to hate and division. And he put words into action by restoring the right to vote to more than 173,000 people. We know Terry McAuliffe, Derek — and we know that he’s the leader Virginia needs right now. = Look, this race isn’t just about a name on the ballot. It’s not just about Terry McAuliffe versus Glenn Youngkin. It’s about the people they’re pledging to serve as governor. Terry McAuliffe has shown us that he will lift up all Virginians and fight for this Commonwealth. Glenn Youngkin has shown us that he will stand with Donald Trump, extremists, and insurrectionists. Right now, we need to fulfill our promise as citizens to stand up for each other, and fight for each other, and vote with each other to change the future for everyone. And Derek, that starts with electing Terry McAuliffe as Governor of Virginia. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being part of this team, Stacey Abrams =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Tom Nelson
subject: a personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Hi —

It feels like yesterday the Taliban regained control of Afghanistan, and the world watched in horror as thousands of people tried unsuccessfully to flee the regime. But, it was more than **two months ago** , and the world has stopped talking about it.

It’s our responsibility to spread awareness about what’s happening in Afghanistan with our former allies AND make sure our new refugee neighbors feel welcome in our community.

I’m proud to partner with World Relief of Fox Valley to respond to the crisis in Afghanistan. Now is the time to show up for our new neighbors, letting them know that we welcome them with open arms, ready to make Wisconsin their new home. The Fox Valley is accepting around 100 Afghan refugees and we want to make their transition as easy as possible.

[If you’re passionate about welcoming refugees, and agree that we need to welcome everyone with love and kindness, will you please join me in donating to World Relief today? Any amount makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37886374/313067239/2010006087?refcode=TN_EM_EN_1MO_211024_1_1&refcode2=a74d9e75-0f35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRkOWU3NS0wZjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGUfOevw46yM7ioVy3upYp_rs0PbGV-5JCDwhfUetmc=&emci=9a8b8ea7-5033-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a74d9e75-0f35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15112925) | | **[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37886375/313067240/2010006087?refcode=TN_EM_EN_1MO_211024_1_1&refcode2=a74d9e75-0f35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRkOWU3NS0wZjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGUfOevw46yM7ioVy3upYp_rs0PbGV-5JCDwhfUetmc=&emci=9a8b8ea7-5033-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a74d9e75-0f35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15112925)**

body:
Nearly 2,000 supporters have already filled this out.
#
Peter, we wanted to make sure that you saw our email from about a week ago. According to our records, _nearly 2,000 supporters_ have already completed our fourth quarter priorities survey — but we noticed you haven’t done so yet.
[**This quick survey is your chance to let Pramila and our team know about your priorities at this critical time. So, can you fill it out now? It takes just a couple of minutes to complete.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/q4-priorities-survey/?source=em-20211024-741&t=1&akid=741%2E420207%2EylJj2z)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/q4-priorities-survey/?source=em-20211024-741&t=2&akid=741%2E420207%2EylJj2z)**
We’re looking forward to reading your response and sharing it with Pramila!
Team Jayapal

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jayapal HQ
Date: Sun. Oct 17, 2021
Subject: Need your input on this
Got a minute, Peter?
As you may know, it’s been a busy few weeks for Team Jayapal as we continue fighting for child care, paid leave, universal pre-K, community college, climate action, affordable housing, Medicare expansion, and a roadmap to citizenship for immigrants through the Build Back Better Act. **But we’re not too busy to check in with you and make sure that our movement’s priorities align with yours in the pivotal final months of 2021.**
[**Can you take a minute or two to fill out our two-question Fourth Quarter Priorities Survey? We’re planning on sharing the results with Pramila as soon as we can.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/q4-priorities-survey/?source=em-20211024-741&t=3&akid=741%2E420207%2EylJj2z)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/q4-priorities-survey/?source=em-20211024-741&t=4&akid=741%2E420207%2EylJj2z)**
Thanks for taking the time to make your voice heard — we really appreciate it.
\--Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211024-741-footer&t=5&refcode2=741_420207_ylJj2z&akid=741%2E420207%2EylJj2z)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

According to our records, nearly 2,000 supporters have already completed our fourth quarter priorities survey — but we noticed you haven’t done so yet. We’re looking forward to reading your response and sharing it with Pramila! Team Jayapal \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Jayapal HQ Date: Sun. Oct 17, 2021 Subject: Need your input on this Got a minute, Peter? As you may know, it’s been a busy few weeks for Team Jayapal as we continue fighting for child care, paid leave, universal pre-K, community college, climate action, affordable housing, Medicare expansion, and a roadmap to citizenship for immigrants through the Build Back Better Act. But we’re not too busy to check in with you and make sure that our movement’s priorities align with yours in the pivotal final months of 2021. Thanks for taking the time to make your voice heard — we really appreciate it. \--Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Chris Palombi
subject: Here’s what you can do to block the Biden agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palombi for Congress
body:
If Joe Biden can control your body, he can take your guns.<
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/CO76383cphN81df892l1e35eMQ/yahF4mafB18WLQy1KTnsLA) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Palombi for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/CO76383cphN81df892l1e35eMQ/yahF4mafB18WLQy1KTnsLA)**.
---
---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/CO76383cphN81df892l1e35eMQ/yahF4mafB18WLQy1KTnsLA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/CO76383cphN81df892l1e35eMQ/yahF4mafB18WLQy1KTnsLA) If Joe Biden can control your body, he can take your guns.

If he can force federal employees to take experimental Covid-19 shots, he can take away your rights and freedoms with the swipe of a pen.

Make no mistake, our country is in grave danger!

[**So before you read on, I urge you to donate a crucial $25, $50, $100 or even more immediately to my grassroots Congressional campaign against Joe Biden Democrat, Steny Hoyer.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/CO76383cphN81df892l1e35eMQ/yahF4mafB18WLQy1KTnsLA)

You know about Joe Biden’s illegal, immoral, vaccine mandate for federal employees.

Let me tell you, what angers me the most about that shocking power grab is the unchecked executive overreach.

If the executive can strong-arm mandates like that, and even browbeat and bully the private sector by sidestepping the House and Senate, he can also push to take away your gun and liberties for good.

**But while Biden appears to be acting only by himself, he needs Nancy Pelosi and her Democrat majority in the House to back him as he tramples on the Bill of Rights and the Constitution.**

So let’s take that from him.

| | [PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/CO76383cphN81df892l1e35eMQ/yahF4mafB18WLQy1KTnsLA)
---

Patriot, let’s take back the House from Joe Biden Democrats like my opponent, Steny Hoyer.

After Joe Biden declared the right to control the bodies of tens of millions of our fellow Americans, here’s what Steny said:

> **“I am hopeful that this action by the Biden Administration sets a positive example for other agencies, state governments, and private companies in our nation to follow.”**
Can you believe that?!

Steny wants MORE mandates telling you and your family what to do!

**THIS HAS TO STOP!**

| [PUT FREEDOM OVER EVERYTHING](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/CO76383cphN81df892l1e35eMQ/yahF4mafB18WLQy1KTnsLA)
---

Patriot, I’m Chris Palombi. I served with the U.S. Capitol Police and I’m running for Congress in Maryland’s fifth district against out of control, Biden Democrat Steny Hoyer.

Right now, I’m filming powerful videos to reach and persuade voters. And block walking, door knocking, phone calling, talking to voters, persuading them, and working to get them to vote for me on Election Day.

I can beat Steny Hoyer with your vital help!

[**Patriot, PLEASE send me to Congress to derail the Biden Agenda with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/CO76383cphN81df892l1e35eMQ/yahF4mafB18WLQy1KTnsLA)

[**Can I count on you for at least $25? If that’s too much to ask right now, can you give $10 now?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/CO76383cphN81df892l1e35eMQ/yahF4mafB18WLQy1KTnsLA)

I hope to hear back from you right away.

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Chris Palombi
Republican Candidate for Congress, Maryland District 5
U.S. Capitol Police veteran, 2007-2012

| [PUT FREEDOM OVER EVERYTHING](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/CO76383cphN81df892l1e35eMQ/yahF4mafB18WLQy1KTnsLA)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chief=20Jarome=20Bell?=
subject: Democrats want me back on their plantation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
I'm not going. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/racist-democrats-4657110?e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=e55e336696&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | Dear Peter,

My Democrat opponent Elaine Luria and the Communist Democrat Party can't stand that I'm a black man with conservative opinions.

They want me back on their plantation, where I'll submit to them in exchange for the promise of "free stuff."

I don't need their charity. _I'm capable of working for myself, taking care of my family, and succeeding without the Communist Democrats_.

[_**I'm a strong, God-fearing, conservative black man, and I need your support today to help me defeat the racist Democrats and win this race**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=457ae81419&e=af4b86f5c6).

Elaine Luria even called me "unhinged" and "dangerous," and said America needs to be protected from my "lunacy."

The truth is, I am dangerous -- dangerous to the Communist Democrat narrative that their party is helping black people.

_It's not. Just look at any Democrat-run city for proof_.

**I'm a proud black conservative, and the Communist Democrats are terrified of me because I'm exposing their schemes to my fellow black Americans**.

[_**Will you help me do that by contributing to my election campaign today**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=75cb2f17e5&e=af4b86f5c6)?

[_**Your generous campaign contributions will help me DESTROY the Communist Democrat narrative about black voters, and flip a U.S. House seat from Blue to Red**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=cc0804863b&e=af4b86f5c6).

The Democrats -- the party of slavery -- are desperately trying to keep black Americans in chains.

_But they can't hold on for much longer_.

President Trump and his America First policies delivered prosperity to black communities like they've never seen before.

I will bring those America First policies back to Washington when I'm elected to Congress.

**But I need your support today, because Elaine Luria and the Communist Democrat machine have MILLIONS of dollars to spend -- and they'll do anything to try to keep me out of office**.

[_**So chip in what you can today -- whether it's $10, $25, $50, or more -- and help me take on the Communist Democrat machine and put America First. **_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=a1de28470c&e=af4b86f5c6) [_**> > Chip in $10
>> Chip in $25
>> Chip in $50
>> Chip in 100
>> Chip in $250
>> Chip in ANY AMOUNT **_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=ce239f3228&e=af4b86f5c6) Thank you in advance for your generosity._** **_ For America,
**** **Chief Jarome Bell**
Republican Candidate
Virginia’s 2nd U.S. House District

**P.S.[The Communist Democrats are desperately trying -- and failing \-- to keep black Americans on their plantation](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=dd8c549f5e&e=af4b86f5c6).**

**_[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=872bd15ae3&e=af4b86f5c6)_****Help me show the racist Communist Democrats that black Americans can think for themselves by chipping into my America First campaign right away**.

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Educating our children honestly
body:
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide,
| | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6dqpscue34fjure6jnamkb73qh3e09gbqbev1po_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chi68o32chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history? We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future. For this reason, we have produced the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** —and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. **What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum?** The**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College—and we are making it available **free of charge**. To be clear, the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact. _We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote the**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** and our other outreach efforts—including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. _ That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you—citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission—to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.” With that mission in mind, we produced the **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** —and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to _**support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?**_ Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty—and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty—I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. **I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here:** _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zavobl6ks6jcbiq12v5nm2u3o1hphccmo4m1v0h0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chi68o32chh2bs)**_ Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

clean_body: This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, | | | | | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history? We must insist on the latter , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future. For this reason, we have produced the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum —and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum? TheHillsdale 1776 Curriculum is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College—and we are making it available free of charge. To be clear, the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum is not a slap-dash response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available free of charge so that it will have the greatest impact. We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote theHillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other outreach efforts—including Imprimis , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you—citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission—to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.” With that mission in mind, we produced the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum —and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty—and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty—I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c419%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=mYNCalxekZVR4cc8hxpxVA&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66242%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3gJif5k9JPUWeEFNLyTFZQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66243%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EZfGxxTXVJR2LD507kHYSg&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66244%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BXF14RnV%2bl9QFLaQWdPSsA&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: American Update
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8971%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2bfHB%2bESvrt%2fbRNCQail82g&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16988%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d%2fx%2bRIxZPj%2fRZSqWZ0JtXQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16988%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d%2fx%2bRIxZPj%2fRZSqWZ0JtXQ&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16989%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LuhGKWCwB0KqsVyr28u4xg&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

clean_body: | Don’t miss the last of October’s trainings! Peter — Take a break from putting the finishing touches on your Halloween costume and join us at two exciting trainings happening this week. Don’t be afraid to join our expert trainers, they don’t bite! 🧛 👻 RSVP for Tuesday, October 26 at 1pm ET. Some people’s biggest fears are ghosts... Others’ are asking those in their network for money! Don’t fear — at this training, we’ll show you how to perfect the hard ask and lean on your network for the support you need to win! | 👻 Then, join us for Wednesday, October 27 at 8pm ET. Learn all you need to know about the role of a precinct chair and other tactics on organizing and engaging with your precinct members. Your Democratic Precinct Chair is a great resource, RSVP and learn how to use them or consider becoming one yourself! name: National Republican Polling
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
_Sponsored message_
| This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zo424f6r8h6381b9g9oeee072d7rvenjsvlilo0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chi64o74clh2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr640lgro7dk52ovvcckvqp47hn67cgolg0qhuj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chi64o74clh2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrqhov1t5en1j8bhd6f5t9ervivnn850ga3uu4k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chi64o74clh2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdfmlvq828q61rrfa08ihn5tcsntogck3ttihc8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chi64o74clh2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhi7dg7cnh3asjgh06ktb8clf09lgkjpfe1vje4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chi64o74clh2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

| | Hi Peter, Nearly thirty GOP lawmakers have just been exposed as long-time members of and donors to the Oath Keepers, a far-right extremist militia group that takes orders directly from Donald Trump. On November 9, 2020, the day after Joe Biden's victory, Oath Keepers said they were “awaiting direction” from Trump, and ran up their numbers by urgently telling recruits “I need you fighting by the inauguration.” Then, moments before Oath Keepers stormed the Capitol on January 6, since-indicted leader Kelly Meggs posted online that Trump “wants us to make it WILD.” There's no sugarcoating it: The Republican establishment is all-in on the Oath Keepers because they know staffing polling stations in Georgia with a volunteer militia will scare progressives out of standing up for our brave Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. If the Oath Keepers can help Mitch McConnell steal back control of the razor-thin 50/50 Senate, he will make sure they have a permanent place in American politics. Look, progressives know that violence is NEVER the answer. By eradicating the Proud Boys' champions from Congress and fervently protecting Raphael Warnock, we will defend our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority and send the militia a message that the Trump Party is OVER. But with nearly 30 exposed Republican lawmakers now poised to represent the Oath Keepers in broad daylight, Warnock has never been at greater risk. And CNN just ranked Raphael Warnock the #1 Democrat most likely to be ousted. We're doubling down on Raphael Warnock and all our brave Senate Democrats, and we'll do all we can to see that they have a safe, clear path to victory in 2022. But right now we're $1,992 short of our vital October 31 fundraising deadline. name: American Update
subject: Your 2021 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8986%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=gIhDZZEUKYB9dSeEaaU2GQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16982%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BmfGKSfj6UfiyYRk2EXedw&sysid=1) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16983%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9IDCwL9tm8MX39iDo3sX6Q&sysid=1 "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16983%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9IDCwL9tm8MX39iDo3sX6Q&sysid=1)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16983%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9IDCwL9tm8MX39iDo3sX6Q&sysid=1)**
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8986%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=gIhDZZEUKYB9dSeEaaU2GQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8986%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=gIhDZZEUKYB9dSeEaaU2GQ&sysid=1)

**But Marco Lopez's (D) opponent for governor, Kari Lake (R), just said she would have BLOCKED Joe Biden from becoming president – despite Arizona's voters electing him.**
Even worse, Donald Trump ENDORSED Lake – meaning his millionaire megadonors will spend BIG to help her defeat Marco and keep battleground Arizona red. If we don't stop her, she could destroy our democracy from the inside out and keep Democrats from EVER winning in Arizona again!
**It's OBVIOUS that we need to defeat this rampant GOP extremism – and The Washington Post confirms that the only surefire way to do that is by electing a Democratic governor instead. Marco Lopez (D) _is_ that Democrat – but he needs your support to win, and our records show you haven't donated to power his movement yet today!**

– Team Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: [photo enclosed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37887588/313073843/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk283-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWVmZTlkMy0xZTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk2wMHItmMlDuUlDjhchXQLUBQ9sZRR3zI7SyqW-Y8s=)
Hi Peter: I want to share an old photo with you. This is my grandma, Helen Finkenauer, with my dad, Jerry, who was just a baby then. **This photo always brings a smile to my face, but it also reminds me of a big issue – one that's at the forefront of my mind every day that I'm on the campaign trail for our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA).**
You see, back in 1958, my grandfather was able to come home from the war and find a job – and not just any job. A very good paying _union _job. He was able to make a living for his family of four, with money left over to get a chance to _enjoy _life. Not only that, he and Grandma had a sense of security knowing a pension and retirement would be there for them in the future.
**It's nice to get nostalgic about old photos, but with that nostalgia comes an important realization: This picture wouldn't exist if my grandpa didn't have the means, provided by his union job, to purchase a camera.**
I'm running for Iowa's Senate seat to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley because our state and country have gone through too many years of seeing middle and working class jobs decimated. There's no way in hell I'm going to sit on the sidelines while billionaires increase their profits as unions get weaker.
You see, working families are _my _family. That little kid you see in the photo above went on to become a union pipefitter-welder, and it was that good job that allowed our family to have a solid quality of life when I was growing up. **We need a senator who will fight for legislation that bolsters the middle class. Sen. Grassley isn't that guy. But my public service has always – _always _– been about the fight for working families like mine. **
**[I'll keep this simple: If you believe that we need people in the Senate who will fight for our working families, and that we need to flip Iowa blue to protect our Senate majority – then I need you with me. Please, can you donate $5 to my campaign right here and now? In a race like this, every dollar counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37887589/313073845/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk283-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWVmZTlkMy0xZTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk2wMHItmMlDuUlDjhchXQLUBQ9sZRR3zI7SyqW-Y8s=)**
Thank you for your support. I'm so grateful to have you on my team.

Abby
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37887590/313073846/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk283-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWVmZTlkMy0xZTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk2wMHItmMlDuUlDjhchXQLUBQ9sZRR3zI7SyqW-Y8s=)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Kevin Kiley
subject: California is now Number One
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [We're Number 1](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziop5zkbQPWAdwIY0CntaJ6KY&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_24_final&n=1) Congratulations to Governor Newsom. California officially has the highest unemployment rate in the United States. We now account for a third of the nation’s jobless claims. Gas prices are also higher than anywhere, as high as $7.59 a gallon. And shorter showers are on the way. Newsom declared a drought emergency because reservoirs are low, even though a few years ago they were overflowing – and water still flows abundantly into the ocean. Speaking of the ocean: Newsom is refusing calls by industry experts to alleviate the backlog at our ports by suspending AB 5. His corruption has become a national crisis. And remember Newsom’s vaccine lotteries? Where he spun a giant wheel, gave away $116 million, and compared himself to Oprah? A study finds they had no effect. Such waste, however, pales in comparison to the latest on "high speed" rail. We've just learned of another _billion_ in cost overruns. Meanwhile, rising crime has Walgreens closing five stores in San Francisco. A Recall of the SF District Attorney appears to have qualified; in LA, 31 cities have censured DA George Gascon with no-confidence votes. Governor Ronald Reagan said California “should never take second place.” Governor Gavin Newsom does have us leading the nation – in all the wrong ways. [Join our movement to save California](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0KOu7WTw5uuSoUQzsIZxhqw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_24_final&n=2) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAy9qfjdYSdaLcqfHH0UC1tVUZCGB6ErR0ecT-5z613TmQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_24_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley

clean_body: | Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: Congratulations to Governor Newsom. California officially has the highest unemployment rate in the United States. We now account for a third of the nation’s jobless claims. Gas prices are also higher than anywhere, as high as $7.59 a gallon. And shorter showers are on the way. Newsom declared a drought emergency because reservoirs are low, even though a few years ago they were overflowing – and water still flows abundantly into the ocean. Speaking of the ocean: Newsom is refusing calls by industry experts to alleviate the backlog at our ports by suspending AB 5. His corruption has become a national crisis. And remember Newsom’s vaccine lotteries? Where he spun a giant wheel, gave away $116 million, and compared himself to Oprah? A study finds they had no effect. Such waste, however, pales in comparison to the latest on "high speed" rail. We've just learned of another billion in cost overruns. Meanwhile, rising crime has Walgreens closing five stores in San Francisco. A Recall of the SF District Attorney appears to have qualified; in LA, 31 cities have censured DA George Gascon with no-confidence votes. Governor Ronald Reagan said California “should never take second place.” Governor Gavin Newsom does have us leading the nation – in all the wrong ways. Kevin Kiley Legislator Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

Friend, Over the last four years I have met so many patriotic Americans in virtually every State of this great nation. My family thanks you for all you have done and continue to do!
| [ Get Your Painting Today! ](http://tr.email.donjr.com/c/eJyNkL1uhDAQhJ8GOpBtwIaC4sKFMl0SpbL8C05sg8DW6d4-Bl1SpIpkuZiZ_VY7smesQnWXmx4BBCFANewaALoSlpdxAEODL91YD2TEY1YD5ZixpVz851aKxeVzT6RQGtcQcqKx4qBpIMCwBm2HgdKA5LafQ1j3rLpkaEwvDTMrwxbdGmbFbuxLeeOnA3cEqjEGR52SJrqsup4LM4QPcV_iJlQSfRRWxf0hC-ZWZiafjASkv0Q6qUAZFct6p4umYTY75YrFYHS0lDm1GcE8TbM-pPgPbfFB-XBsEbb4eCHTM35_fbslm3prZDL-iPspQl5JwGFTtACKotZcFLxFoOBaKgmbirCW51sv15ux1uyYpDans82jx3SCNfreZ-QpQyjGhETorAz9B3yE0ZD-cF_V7-QDWj46RBm5fgOTsJyZ)
---
| | |
---
I wanted to share with you a unique work of art that was commissioned by a family friend as a gift for my father. “The Awakening”, by nationally recognized artist Raymond A. Simon, is truly an incredible work of art with an inspiring message behind it. Simon uses symbolism and vibrant colors to tell the moving story of my father’s Presidency. This painting captures the spirit and legacy of our 45th President and a national movement that has not happened since the days of our nation’s founding. President Donald J. Trump is featured front and center, as he took the world’s stage and led this nation to the greatest economic growth since WWII. In the painting, President Trump looks out to the future with fortitude, understanding his influence has started a movement in our Republic that will endure for generations. The family friend who presented my father with this gift asked me to share
this brilliant work of art with you, and I could not be more proud to do so.

Now you can get your own canvas reproduction of this amazingly stunning painting by visiting his website. This painting tells an inspiring story of a great President. Get your own copy today! Donald Trump Jr.
| | © 2021 Liberal Privilege Book
---

body:
This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6Fu2hVherSo4tHfvlsVfiPuDGshQbXvKtw5w8YFR98sFBVJJVXuf1L8LpPdsadeybYNztnjARe7Dpo_Jz012C2nKHfz73XZi8X3t6SUfL8humyohI2clitkogrZPygQlqvX6RKTD-dCxadn9TNeSMZCPujyrtI9QqOUvzq4U09CmtWLJQhTQEvpq-E4Kqc--allvyq21vLDAxhqS6998by8H_vYNzr138WI1ZT4i6-m8vWZT4fhMuE-XiM3g0BlF2eg/3gf/4Y67SGahQjGCfY3OHlTqBA/h0/s5AxayZKOJT97JfKCo2ZtTB0s0Jfa94-YAli7T-v3Co)
This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again.

We are sorry to put that terrible thought in your head, but it's true.

**[That's why we’re asking for you to split a $25 donation between our campaign and Common Good VA before our fundraising deadline comes to a close.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6Fu2hVherSo4tHfvlsVfiPuBNylM8xxn4wEYXFTe1-T4NupHlKP3NUoVqxIWFVqOiWCdbIDDdjAxZfAvjSL4BDYt3j-ri8DvDNECtIQ_-i-TRxvTv1ZUrBHIufl_XjTGhU8P0EZ_wxWOi3P5QDbwSCyi83X-PkX6oPSVOAXGuHtScO6yBPnwWX4aaj3x0Ak_RCqJjHOpYcTxgkl1wtdf6uCb7dHFSmLRdgHRwmu-oUUzu5wanduWhcuLwVGlFYTy9Tg/3gf/4Y67SGahQjGCfY3OHlTqBA/h1/fQNWbysBYk8j2Dig12c_zUvTVHRwzSopvsdpRJbfGsM)**

Well, by the time you get to this part of the email someone else has already chipped in $25. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. It all adds up and that is how we win.

What do you say?

Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again. | | | This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again. We are sorry to put that terrible thought in your head, but it's true. Now, you're probably thinking how can $25 overcome the huge amount of money pouring into Arizona to beat Mark Kelly? Well, by the time you get to this part of the email someone else has already chipped in $25. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. It all adds up and that is how we win. What do you say?
